Once the {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} ends, the hag's soul and the new body unite. Over the course of three years and three days, the new body changes back into the hag's original form. The hag still gains the benefit of the body's age when she took possession of it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The herald casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Otherworldly Calm
entries: The herald has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions, and its thoughts can't be read. A creature that attempts to read the herald's thoughts is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The herald makes three attacks, using Handaxe or Psychic Burst in any combination.

action.name: Handaxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 6 ({@damage 2d6}) Cold damage.

action.name: Psychic Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft or range 60 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Prophecy of Doom (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 15-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is subjected to a random effect from the {@table Eldritch Effects|GrimHollowMG24} table. All targets are subjected to the same effect. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats its save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The priest casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}, {@hit 4} to spell attacks):

action.name: Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Cold damage.

action.name: Psychic Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft or range 60 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Prophecy of Doom (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 15-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is subjected to a random effect from the {@table Eldritch Effects|GrimHollowMG24} table. All targets are subjected to the same effect. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats its save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

trait.name: Death Throes
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the brazen bull when it dies. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Soulfire Nimbus
entries: At the start of each of the brazen bull's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Radiant damage. A creature that touches the brazen bull or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Radiant damage.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The Empyrean brazen bull deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The brazen bull makes two attacks, using Bite or Hooves in any combination. It can replace one attack with Gore.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 3d10 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 20}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the brazen bull can't Bite another target.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 3d12 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage. If the brazen bull moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and the brazen bull can make a Bite or Hooves attack against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 feet. {@h}24 ({@damage 3d10 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The brazen bull makes one Bite attack against a Medium or smaller creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} with its Bite. {@h}The target takes the Bite attack's damage, no longer has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition, and is swallowed. While swallowed, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the brazen bull. It takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage at the start of each of the brazen bull's turns.

If the brazen bull takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the brazen bull must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which lands in a space within 10 feet of the brazen bull and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the brazen bull dies, the swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Ever Observant
entries: This celestial has reduced itself to individual floating eyes that never stop watching. It cannot be surprised.

action.name: Flash of Light
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the eye. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage, and the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it automatically succeeds. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The eye has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition and can teleport to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The knight doesn't provoke an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The knight has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Only Forward
entries: The knight is unable to flee from battle until all its enemies are destroyed or it is.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The knight makes two Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Force damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Peacemaking
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}, up to four {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creatures the bloodied can see. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and weeps uncontrollably until another creature takes an action to shake it out of its trance.

action.name: Shared Sacrifice
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 16}, one creature within 60 feet that the bloodied can see. {@actSaveFail} Until the end of the bloodied next turn, the bloodied has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage, and whenever the bloodied takes damage, the target takes the same amount.

reaction.name: Ultimate End
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 60 feet of the bloodied targets it with an attack. {@actResponse}—{@actSave wis} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target takes Force damage equal to the bloodied's remaining {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and the bloodied dies. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage, and the damage can't reduce the target to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If the creature would be reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it is reduced to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

trait.name: Plant Stride {@recharge 5}
entries: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger area of plants, the epachrach can teleport to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger area of plants that is within 60 feet of the previous area. These plants can be animate creatures, such as a treant, or magical, such as the plants the Entangle spell calls forth.

trait.name: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: If the epachrach takes 30 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it is reduced to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The epachrach deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Tusk
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Slashing damage. If the epachrach moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and the epachrach can make a Hooves attack against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. one {@condition Prone|XPHB} creature. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Fey Touched
entries: Magic can't put the faevlin to sleep. Only a Fey creature can cause the faevlin to have the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and a faevlin always knows when a non-Fey creature attempts to impose the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition on it.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Sneaky
entries: The faevlin takes the Hide action.

reaction.name: Fey Fade
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature misses the faevlin with an attack. {@actResponse} The faevlin can teleport up to 30 feet in a random direction, appearing in an unoccupied space.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The inquisitor hunter casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 11}):

spellcasting.name: Hunter's Mark (1/Day)
headerEntries: The inquisitor hunter casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB} using the same spellcasting ability as in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Inquisitor's Awareness
entries: The inquisitor hunter can spend 1 minute maintaining {@status Concentration|XPHB} to learn whether any arcane or innate spellcasters, Aberrations, Fey, and Fiends are within 1 mile. This trait doesn't reveal the creatures' locations or numbers.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The inquisitor hunter makes two Shortsword attacks, provided it has a Shortsword in each hand.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Psychic damage if the target is maintaining {@status Concentration|XPHB} on a spell.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, ranged 150/600 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Psychic damage if the target is maintaining {@status Concentration|XPHB} on a spell.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The inquisitor priest casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

spellcasting.name: Spiritual Weapon (1/Day)
headerEntries: The inquisitor priest casts the {@spell Spiritual Weapon|XPHB} spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Ward
entries: When the inquisitor priest casts a spell that causes creatures to regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the priest can choose one of the spell's targets and end the effects of one spell affecting it. The effect must be from a spell of equal or lower level to the priest's healing spell.

action.name: Warhammer
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Force damage, or 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Force damage if the target is maintaining {@status Concentration|XPHB} on a spell.

trait.name: Brave
entries: The inquisitor knight has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws made to avoid or end the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Discerning
entries: The inquisitor knight has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against illusions.

trait.name: Mark
entries: When the inquisitor knight hits a creature with a melee weapon attack, it Marks the target until the end of the inquisitor knight's next turn. The Mark ends early if the knight has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition or dies, or another creature Marks the same target. While the Marked creature is within the inquisitor knight's reach, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against creatures other than the inquisitor knight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The inquisitor knight makes two attacks, using Longsword or Javelin in any combination.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage, or 8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Slashing damage if wielded with two hands. The inquisitor knight Marks the target.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the attack was a melee attack, the inquisitor knight Marks the target.

reaction.name: Marked Control
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature Marked by the inquisitor knight moves while within 5 feet of the inquisitor knight. {@actResponse} The inquisitor knight makes a Longsword attack against the triggering creature. {@h}In addition to the Longsword damage, the creature's Speed becomes 0 until the end of its turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The inquisitor warder casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Ward
entries: When the inquisitor warder casts a spell that causes creatures to regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the warder can choose one of the spell's targets and end the effects of one spell affecting it. The effect must be from a spell of equal or lower level to the warder's healing spell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The inquisitor warder makes three Warhammer attacks.

action.name: Warhammer
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Force damage, or 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Force damage if the target is maintaining {@status Concentration|XPHB} on a spell.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Inquisitor Judge casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Aura of Clarity
entries: While conscious, the inquisitor judge emits a 10- foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of clarifying magic. Each creature in the area of the judge's choice can't have the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} or {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition, and the judge chooses whether creatures and objects in the area can have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Smite
entries: Once per turn, when the inquisitor judge hits a creature with a melee weapon attack, it can expend a spell from its Spellcasting action. The spell has no effect, and the attack deals an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage for a 2/Day spell or 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage for a 1/Day spell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The inquisitor judge makes three Greatsword attacks.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing Slashing plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Radiant damage.

bonus.name: Brand Heretic (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The inquisitor judge brands one creature it can see within 30 feet as a heretic. For 1 minute, the inquisitor judge's attacks against the heretic score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

reaction.name: Punish Heretic
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature starts its turn within 5 feet of the inquisitor judge. {@actResponse} The inquisitor judge can make a Greatsword attack against the creature.

trait.name: Seven Shades of Sitri
entries: A Humanoid that touches the Sitri cat or takes damage from its Claws attack is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target is infected with a disease called the {@disease Seven Shades of Sitri|GrimHollowPG24}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the disease for 24 hours.

An infected target is overwhelmed with carnal urges. When the target interacts with a non-{@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} Humanoid, it has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the Humanoid or its allies harm the target. Every 24 hours, the target repeats the save, ending the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition but not the disease on a success. The disease ends after the target succeeds on five saves.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Slashing damage, and the target is subjected to the Seven Shades of Sitri.

trait.name: Faith Cough
entries: A Humanoid that touches the faith finch or takes damage from its Talons attack is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target is infected with a disease called {@disease Faith Cough|GrimHollowPG24}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the disease for 24 hours.

An infected target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks and Constitution saving throws. Every 24 hours, the target repeats its save. The disease ends after the target succeeds on seven saves.

trait.name: Inspired Presence
entries: A creature that succeeds on a {@dc 15} Wisdom ({@skill Animal Handling}) check can coax a faith finch to land on them. A person a faith finch lands on gains {@variantrule Heroic Inspiration|XPHB}.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Slashing damage, and the target is subjected to Faith Cough.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The pox dog has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the dog's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Weeping Pox
entries: A Humanoid that comes within 5 feet of the pox dog is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target is infected with a disease called the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the disease for 24 hours.

An infected target initially has sharpened senses and a sense of wellbeing. Whenever the target makes an ability check or a saving throw against something other than the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24}, it can roll a {@dice d4} and add the result to its roll.

Every 24 hours, the target makes another save. {@actSaveFail} The disease's benefits end, and the target suffers a level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB}. This {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} can't be reduced until the disease is cured. The {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24} can only be cured by magic.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Piercing damage, and the target is subjected to Weeping Pox.

entities.name: Fate Cat
languages: understands all language but can't speak

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The fate cat casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Magical Retaliation
headerEntries: The fate cat casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Hellish Rebuke|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The fate cat regains 5 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the fate cat takes Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the fate cat's next turn. The fate cat's body is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: When the fate cat's body is destroyed, its soul lingers. After 24 hours, the soul inhabits and animates another cat corpse on the same place of existence and regains all of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. While the soul is bodiless, a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell can force the soul into the afterlife and prevent it from returning.

trait.name: Sin Tracker
entries: The fate cat knows the distance and direction of any creature that has wronged it, even on another plane of existence. If the creature the fate cat is tracking dies, the fate cat dies as well.

trait.name: Turn Immunity
entries: The fate cat is immune to effects that Turn Undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The fate cat can make two Claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage.

entities.name: Living Dream
languages: understands all languages but can't speak

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The living dream casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The living dream can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Dream Strike
entries: {@atkr ms,rs} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the end of its next turn.

bonus.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The living dream takes the Disengage or Hide action.

entities.name: Katoche
languages: understands all languages but can't speak

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The katoche can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The katoche makes three Bewildering Strikes.

action.name: Bewildering Strike
entries: {@atkr ms,rs} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Psychic damage, and the target is affected as if by the {@spell Confusion|XPHB} spell until the end of its next turn.

reaction.name: Separate
entries: {@actTrigger} The katoche becomes Bloodied. {@actResponse} The katoche splits into one {@creature Living Dream|GrimHollowMG24} and one {@creature Living Nightmare|GrimHollowMG24}.
Each new creature has {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the katoche's, rounded down.

entities.name: Living Nightmare
languages: understands all languages but can't speak

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The living nightmare casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The living nightmare can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The living nightmare makes two Nightmare Strikes.

action.name: Nightmare Strike
entries: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack:
{@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the living nightmare's next turn.

bonus.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The living dream takes the Disengage or Hide action.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Locate Signee
entries: The infernal contractor senses the direction of any creature that has signed one of its contracts, provided it is on the same plane of existence. If the creature is moving, the contractor knows the direction of its movement. Effects that protect the target from Divination work against this action.

bonus.name: Infernal Brand {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 13}, one creature the infernal contractor can see within 60 feet. A creature that signed a contract with the contractor has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. The target must roll a {@dice d4} and subtract the result from each {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB} it makes. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. The effect ends early if the contractor uses this {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} again or the target enters hallowed ground.

reaction.name: Infernal Luck
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet makes a {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB}. {@actResponse} The contractor forces the target to reroll the {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB} and use the lower roll. The target is then immune to this contractor's Infernal Luck for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The infernal tormentor makes two Greatsword attacks. It can replace one attack with Infernal Leash.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Infernal Leash {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 13}, one creature the infernal tormentor can see within 30 feet. A creature that has signed a fiendish contract has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on this save. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage. The target is pulled 10 feet toward the tormentor and cursed for 1 minute or until the tormentor uses this action again. The curse also ends if the target enters hallowed ground.

While cursed, the target can't move more than 30 feet from the tormentor and takes an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage from the tormentor's Greatsword attacks. As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, the tormentor can move the target up to 10 feet to any unoccupied space within 30 feet of the tormentor. If the space is dangerous, the target repeats the save before moving, ending the effect on a success.

trait.name: Heated Body
entries: A creature that touches the troll or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The troll has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the troll takes Acid or Cold damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three attacks: one with its Bite and two with its Claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage and 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage and 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

entries: A creature that touches the troll or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Regeneration

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three attacks, using Claw or Spit Fire in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Force damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage, or 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage if it has used Call Flame.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Force damage and 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Spit Fire
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 6}, range 40/120 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Control Flame
entries: The troll chooses a fire it can see within 30 feet of it and expands that fire by one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}, extinguishes fire in one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}, or makes shapes in the fire in one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}. Expanded fire needs fuel to continue burning.

action.name: Firebane (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 20-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the troll can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Fire damage and the target is cursed for 1 minute. While cursed, the target must roll {@dice 1d4} and subtract the result from its attack rolls and saving throws. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried ignite.

bonus.name: Call Flame
entries: The troll ignites a magical fire in its maw, which lasts until the start of its next turn. It can't use Spite Fire or Firebane unless this flame is lit.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The troll can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Aquatic Camouflage
entries: The troll has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to {@action Hide|XPHB} underwater.

trait.name: Flexible
entries: The troll can move through spaces large enough for a Medium creature.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the troll takes Cold or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

entries: The troll makes three attacks: one with its Bite and two with its Claws.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage and 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three attacks, using Claw or Spit Acid in any combination. It can replace one attack with Bite, or replace two attacks with Call Fog.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage and 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage.

action.name: Claw

action.name: Spit Acid
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 5}, range 30/60 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage.

action.name: Call Fog (1/Day)
entries: The troll creates a 30-foot radius {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of fog that spreads around corners and renders its area {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB}. It lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind (like that created by a {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}).
The troll can choose to make this fog caustic. If it does, a creature that enters the fog for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there takes 10 ({@damage 4d4}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The troll has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the troll takes Acid or Thunder damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The troll deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Sure Stance
entries: The troll has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength and Dexterity saving throws to avoid forced movement or the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three attacks: one with its Bite and two with its Claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Slashing damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Claw Technique (1/Turn)
entries: A creature hit by the troll's Claw or Kinetic Claw is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target suffers one of the following effects of the troll's choice:

items: The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
The target is pushed up to 15 feet straight away from the troll.
The target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the end of the troll's next turn.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the troll takes Acid or Thunder damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The troll deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Sure Stance
entries: The troll has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength and Dexterity saving throws to avoid forced movement or the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes four attacks: one Bite attack and three Claw or Kinetic Claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Slashing damage, and the target is subjected to Claw Technique.

action.name: Kinetic Claw
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 6}, range 60/120 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d12 + 2}) Slashing damage, and the target is subjected to Claw Technique.

bonus.name: Purify
entries: The troll ends the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, or {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition on itself.

trait.name: Flexible
entries: The troll can move through spaces large enough for a Medium creature.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The troll has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The troll's {@variantrule Long Jump|XPHB} is up to 40 feet and its {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB} is up to 20 feet, with or without a running start.

entries: The troll makes three attacks: one with its Bite and two with its Claws.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

entries: The troll takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

entries: The troll can move through spaces large enough for a Medium creature.

entries: The troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The troll deals an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the troll, the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, and the troll doesn't have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The troll's {@variantrule Long Jump|XPHB} is up to 40 feet and its {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB} is up to 20 feet, with or without a running start.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three attacks, using Bite or Claw in any combination.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The troll takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

bonus.name: Windborn Step
entries: The troll teleports to an unoccupied space within 40 feet, provided its starting space and destination space are both obscured by mist or similar airborne particles, {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB}, or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the thunderblossom remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary flowering plant.

action.name: Boom Bloom
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the thunderblossom. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Thunder damage and the target has the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveFailBy 3} The target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The explosion can be heard from up to 150 feet away.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the lightning vine remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary plant.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lightning vine makes two attacks, using Grasp or Arc in any combination. If it has a creature grappled, it uses Stunning Shock if available.

action.name: Grasp
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 20 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The lightning vine can grapple up to four Medium or smaller targets at a time.

action.name: Arc
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 30 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d8}) Lightning damage, and the target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Stunning Shock {@recharge 4}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the lightning vine. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Lightning damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the flash freeze remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary tree.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The flash freeze makes three attacks, using Chill Slam or Ice Boulder in any combination.

action.name: Chill Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage.

action.name: Ice Boulder
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 60/180 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Cold damage.

action.name: Flash Freeze {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the flash freeze. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Cold damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If this damage reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it is {@variantrule Stable|XPHB} and has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition for 1 minute, turning into a statue of ice.

trait.name: Reckless (in Fractured Rage Only)
entries: At the start of its turn, the fractured socialite can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on melee weapon attacks until the start of its next turn, but attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} for the same duration.

action.name: Multiattack (in Fractured Rage Only)
entries: The fractured socialite makes two Cane attacks.

action.name: Cane
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Fractured Rage (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The fractured socialite becomes enraged, swelling in size and distorting facial features to an unrecognizable state. This transformation lasts for 1 hour or until the socialite has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. The socialite gains 10 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, which last until the transformation ends. While enraged, the socialite can roll {@dice 1d4} and add the result to each Strengthbased {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB} and damage roll it makes.

trait.name: Brutal Attacks (in Fractured Rage Only)
entries: When the fractured noble scores a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} with a melee weapon attack, it deals an additional die of damage.

trait.name: Instinctive
entries: The fractured noble has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} rolls. Unless it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, the fractured noble makes {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} rolls normally even when surprised, but it must enter Fractured Rage on its first turn.

trait.name: Reckless (in Fractured Rage Only)
entries: At the start of its turn, the fractured noble can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on melee weapon attacks until the start of its next turn, but attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} for the same duration.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The fractured noble makes two Longsword attacks. In Fractured Rage, it makes three melee attacks instead.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Fractured Rage (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The fractured noble becomes enraged, swelling in size and distorting facial features to an unrecognizable state. This transformation lasts for 1 hour or until the socialite has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. The noble gains 30 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, which last until the transformation end. While enraged, the socialite can roll 2d4 and add the result to each Strength-based {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB} and damage roll it makes.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The fzeglaich has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The fzeglaich regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}. If the fzeglaich takes Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the fzeglaich's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The fzeglaich makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage, and the fzeglaich regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the amount of Necrotic damage dealt. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Rampage
entries: After reducing a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a melee attack, the fzeglaich moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a Bite attack.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The fzeg has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the fzeg fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The fzeg regains 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}. If the fzeg takes Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the fzeg's next turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The fzeg can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The fzeg uses its Howl, then makes one Bite attack and two Rend attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. A Humanoid slain by the fzeg's Bite rises the following night as a fzeglaich under the fzeg's control.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Howl
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, each creature within 300 feet of the fzeg that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. If a creature succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the fzeg's Howl for 24 hours or until it gets the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition from the fzeg.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The fzeg shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or back into its true hybrid form. It can transform its body parts as part of its attacks and chooses whether the change remains after the attack. Other than its Size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The fzeg moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: The fzeg makes a Rend attack.

legendary.name: Incite
entries: The fzeg chooses an ally with a {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB} of 10 or lower it can see within 60 feet that has a Bite attack. If the target can see and hear the fzeg, it can use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make a Bite attack.

legendary.name: Bite
entries: The fzeg makes a Bite attack. The fzeg can't use this Legendary Action again until the start of its next turn.

entities.name: Garish Augment
languages: Deep Speech or Infernal plus one national language

trait.name: Augmented Movement
entries: The garish augment has two other {@variantrule Speed|XPHB|Speeds}:{@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB|Burrowing} (20 feet), {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB|Climbing} (30 feet), or {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB|Swimming} (30 feet).

trait.name: Augmented Spit
entries: TThe garish augment's Spit attack deals Acid, Necrotic, or Poison damage, chosen when the garish augment was created.

trait.name: Augmented Strikes
entries: The garish augment's Strike attack deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, chosen when the garish augment was created.

trait.name: Jumper
entries: The garish augment jumps twice as far as normal.

trait.name: Unnatural Presence
entries: Effects that detect Aberrations or Fiends can detect the garish augment.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The garish augment makes three attacks, using Strike or Spit in any combination.

action.name: Strike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) damage of the type from Augmented Strikes.

action.name: Spit
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/60 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) damage of the type from Augmented Spit.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature that garish augment can see hits it with an attack. {@actResponse} The garish augment adds 2 to its {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Three Heads
entries: The gasdra has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks and on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, or {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} conditions. The gasdra can take one {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} for each of its heads. The extra reactions can be used only for {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

trait.name: Wakeful
entries: While the gasdra sleeps, at least one of its heads is awake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gasdra makes three Beak attacks.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Seven Heads
entries: The gasdra has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks and on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, or {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} conditions. The gasdra can take one {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} for each of its heads. The extra reactions can be used only for {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

trait.name: Wakeful
entries: While the giant gasdra sleeps, at least one of its heads is awake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gasdra makes seven Beak attacks, or makes four Beak attack and uses Honk of Doom.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning. If the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition, it takes an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Honk of Doom
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, each creature within 60 feet of the gasdra that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. If the creature succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the gasdra's Honk of Doom for 24 hours.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The gasper can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Submerged Invisibility
entries: The gasper has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition while underwater.

action.name: Water Snare
entries: {@atkr ms} {@hit 4}, reach 15 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}) and is pulled 10 feet toward the gasper. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't breathe, and the gasper can't use Water Snare against another creature. A creature completely submerged while {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the gasper takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the gasper's turns.

entities.name: Gegazol

trait.name: Ice Walk
entries: Gegazol can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} composed of ice or snow doesn't cost her extra movement.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If Gegazol fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Gegazol has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If destroyed while her soul vessel remains intact, Gegazol's unconscious body rejuvenates within 5 feet of the soul vessel, where she regains 78 ({@dice 12d12}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} each day. When she loses the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition, she regains consciousness.

trait.name: Stench
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of Gegazol is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 23}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to Gegazol's Stench for 1 hour.

trait.name: Turning {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB}
entries: Gegazol and Undead within 120 feet of her are immune to effects that Turn Undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Gegazol uses Corrupting Tail, then makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 15 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 2d12 + 8}) Force damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Corrupting Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 60 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage, and the target gains 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level.

action.name: Breath of Long Night {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 23}, each creature in a 90-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Cold damage and 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target suffers 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level until the end of Gegazol's next turn. {@actSaveFailBy 5} The target also has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, Gegazol can expend a use to take one of the following actions. Geggzol regains all expended uses at the start of each of her turns.

legendary.name: Daemon Sight
entries: Gegazol gains Truesight with a range of 120 feet until the end of her next turn, then takes the Search action.

legendary.name: Pounce
entries: Gegazol moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Rend attack. Gegazol can't use this action again until the start of her next turn.

legendary.name: Tail Swipe
entries: Gegazol makes a Corrupting Tail attack.

legendary.name: Wings of Winter
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 23}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from Gegazol. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Gegazol then flies up to half her {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB}. Gegazol can't use this action again until the start of her next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gore elemental makes three Gruesome Deluge attacks against separate targets. It can replace one attack with Grisly Mire.

action.name: Gruesome Deluge
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}).

action.name: Grisly Mire
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the gore elemental. {@actSaveFail} 15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions and can't breathe. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is pushed into an adjacent space, ending the grapple.

reaction.name: Swelling Crimson (1/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} The gore elemental reduces a living creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and it doesn't have the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition. {@actResponse} The gore elemental's Size increases to Huge. While Huge, the gore elemental gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all Strength and Constitution saving throws, its Gruesome Deluge attack can grapple Large targets, and its Grisly Mire action deals 26 ({@damage 4d10 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage on a failed save. The gore elemental reverts to its original size when it becomes {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The gozomite has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the gozomite's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The gozomite can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gozomite makes two Bite attacks. It can replace on attack with Stinger.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Stinger
entries: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 15 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Piercing damage, and the target is injected with hundreds of gozomite eggs that hatch after {@dice 2d4} rounds. If the target takes Fire damage, the eggs die before hatching.

After the eggs hatch, the target takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Piercing damage at the start of each of its turns as the gozomitelings feast on its flesh. A creature can take an action to kill or remove the gozomitelings using an open flame or a weapon that deals Piercing or Slashing damage, dealing 10 damage to the target in the process, or a successful {@dc 10} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine}) check that deals no damage.
A creature reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by the gozomitelings dies. Its corpse is devoured by the gozomitelings after 1 round, leaving behind only its equipment and bones.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the grief eater remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a person cloaked in grey, sitting and clutching their legs.

trait.name: Grief Sense
entries: The grief eater can sense a {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or despairing Humanoid or another grief eater within 60 feet. A grief eater using this sense knows the target's location and the direction of its movement.

trait.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: While in Bright Light, the grief eater has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage, plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage if the target is {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or despairing. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Psychic damage taken, and the grief eater regains an equal number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. The target dies if this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0.
If a Humanoid is slain by this reduction and left unburied, a grief eater emerges from its corpse 24 hours later, provided its corpse is in {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

action.name: Wail
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 12}, one creature within 30 feet. The target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its save if it is despairing. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. If the target succeeds on its saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the Wail of any grief eater for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grim piper makes two Dagger attacks. It can replace one attack with Cruel Notes.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Cruel Notes
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, one creature within 30 feet that is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the grim piper's Luring Melody. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on saving throws for 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Luring Melody
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, each living creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} that can hear the grim piper. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition. The grim piper must take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its subsequent turns to continue playing. It can stop playing at any time. The song ends if the grim piper has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. If the target is more than 5 feet from the grim piper, it must approach on each of its turns until it is within 5 feet. The target takes the most direct route and doesn't avoid danger, but before moving into damaging terrain, it can repeat the save. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the grim piper's Luring Melody for 24 hours.

entities.name: Grinstagger

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Grinstagger casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

spellcasting.name: Misty Step
headerEntries: Grinstagger casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Innate Spellcasting.

trait.name: Accursed Attacks
entries: A creature that takes damage from the Grinstagger's attacks is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed for 24 hours. While cursed, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks and takes an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage from Grinstagger's attacks. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to Accursed Attacks for 24 hours.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Grinstagger regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of his turn if he has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

trait.name: Ring of Mind Shielding
entries: Grinstagger wears an invisible {@item Ring of Mind Shielding|XDMG}. He has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to magic that allows other creatures to read his thoughts, determine whether he's lying, know his {@variantrule Alignment|XPHB}, or know his creature type. Creatures can telepathically communicate with him only if he allows it.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If Grinstagger fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Grinstagger makes three attacks , using Claw and Eldritch Bolt in any combination.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Force damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage, and the target is subjected to Accursed Attacks.

action.name: Eldritch Bolt
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 10}, range 120 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Force damage, and the target is subjected to Accursed Attacks.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: Grinstagger shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, a Large giant, or back into his true form. Other than his Size, his game statistics are the same in each form, and any form he takes retains his accursed appearance. Equipment he is wearing or carrying changes size with him, remaining transformed until he relinquishes it or dies.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, Grinstagger can expend a use to take one of the following actions. Grinstagger regains all expended uses at the start of each of his turns.

legendary.name: Move
entries: Grinstagger moves up to his {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Grinstagger makes a Claw or Eldritch Bolt attack.

legendary.name: Deft Magic
entries: Grinstagger casts an at-will spell from Spellcasting or uses {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}.

trait.name: Death Spores
entries: If the gripper is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it swells for 1 round, then uses Spores, if able.

trait.name: Echo Navigation
entries: If the gripper has the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved

trait.name: Otherworldly Perception
entries: The gripper's {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} extends into the Ethereal Plane.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 10 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the gripper can't Constrict another target.

action.name: Spores (1/Day)
entries: The gripper releases spores in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, or a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} if it is dead. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} spreads around corners and is immediately dispersed by a moderate or stronger wind.

{@actSave con} {@dc 10}, a creature that starts its turn in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} or moves there for the first time on a turn. {@actSaveFail} 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, but not the damage, caused by all grippers' Spores for 1 hour.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 0 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Acid damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the grotesquerie remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a rotting tree stump.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the grotesquerie fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Woodland Minions
entries: The grotesquerie has three {@creature Swarm of Grotesquerie Minions|GrimHollowMG24|Swarms of Grotesquerie Minions} at its command. Each swarm is the grotesquerie's ally and takes its turn just after the grotesquerie. The swarm obeys the grotesquerie's telepathic or verbal commands (no Action required for the grotesquerie). If issued no commands, the swarm defends itself from {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creatures, but otherwise takes no actions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grotesquerie makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Acid damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the grotesquerie can't Bite another target.

action.name: Call Animals
entries: The grotesquerie summons another {@creature Swarm of Grotesquerie Minions|GrimHollowMG24} into an unoccupied space within 60 feet.

action.name: Devour Animals
entries: The grotesquerie orders one {@creature Swarm of Grotesquerie Minions|GrimHollowMG24} into its maw. The swarm is removed from the {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} order, and the grotesquerie regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} up to the amount the swarm had remaining.

action.name: Grotesque Vomit {@recharge 4}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

If the grotesquerie has a creature swallowed, it expels the creature, hurling it up to 30 feet into random unoccupied space in the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. The target takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Bludgeoning damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the grotesquerie has used Devour Animals, a swarm of grotesquerie minions also lands safely in a random space in the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} and rejoins the {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} order.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The grotesquerie makes one Bite attack against a Medium or smaller creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} with its Bite. {@h}The target takes the Bite attack's damage, no longer has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition, and is swallowed. While swallowed, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the grotesquerie. It takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Bludgeoning damage and 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Acid damage at the start of each of the grotesquerie's turns. The grotesquerie can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

If the grotesquerie takes 25 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the grotesquerie must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which lands in a space within 10 feet of the grotesquerie and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the grotesquerie dies, the swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape the corpse using 10 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Hungry Jaws
entries: The grotesquerie makes a Bite attack or uses Swallow.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The grotesquerie moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Animal Control
entries: The grotesquerie uses Call Animals or Devour Animals. The grotesquerie can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Center (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The grudgel gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The grudgel strategist casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

spellcasting.name: Shield (2/Day)
headerEntries: The grudgel strategist casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Magical Movement (2/Day)
headerEntries: The grudgel strategist casts {@spell Expeditious Retreat|XPHB} or {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Weapon Bond
entries: The grudgel strategist can only be disarmed if it is dead or has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grudgel strategist makes two Halberd attacks. It can replace one attack with Shooting Star.

action.name: Halberd
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Slashing damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it is pushed 5 feet to another unoccupied space within the grudgel strategist's reach or has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition (grudgel's choice).

action.name: Shooting Star
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 60 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage, and the target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the start of the grudgel strategist's next turn.

bonus.name: Center (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The grudgel strategist gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the start of its next turn.

reaction.name: Battlefield Control
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature moves into the grudgel strategist's reach. {@actResponse} The grudgel strategist makes an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} against the triggering creature.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The grudgel battlemind casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Shield (2/Day)
headerEntries: The grudgel battlemind casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
headerEntries: The grudgel battlemind casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Action Surge (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The grudgel battlemind takes an extra Action on its turn.

trait.name: Weapon Bond
entries: The grudgel battlemind can be disarmed only if {@condition incapacitated} or dead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The grudgel battlemind makes three weapon attacks or casts one cantrip and makes one weapon attack.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) slashing damage.

bonus.name: Center (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The grudgel battlemind gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll or ability check it makes before the start of its next turn.

reaction.name: Battlefield Control
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature moves into the grudgel strategist's reach. {@actResponse} The grudgel strategist makes an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} against the triggering creature.

entities.name: Hag-Blighted
languages: the languages known before the curse

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The hag-blighted has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hag-blighted makes one Bite attack and one Slam attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Spew Bile (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

entities.name: Harvester of Lies
languages: the languages it knew in life

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The harvestercasts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components except its {@item Coat of Lies|GrimHollowMG24} and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
headerEntries: The harvester casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Coat of Lies
entries: While wearing their specially prepared coat, the harvester's AC includes its Charisma modifier (included above) and it can use its Innate Spellcasting.

trait.name: Hear Lies
entries: The harvester hears all lies uttered within 1 mile of it. By maintaining {@status Concentration|XPHB}, the harvester can sense the liar's distance and direction.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The harvester can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Trackless
entries: The harvester leaves no tracks to indicate where it has been or where it is heading.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harvester makes three Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with Sever Tongue.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Slashing damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}).

action.name: Sever Tongue
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft., one Humanoid {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the harvester. {@h}33 ({@damage 8d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.{@actSave con} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target's tongue is ripped out. The target can't speak or cast spells with Verbal components. A creature with {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Slashing damage, Legendary {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB}, Legendary Actions, or the ability to speak without a tongue has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to this effect.
A tongue can be reattached within 1 hour of being severed with a successful {@dc 10} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine}) check, or can be regrown using magic that replaces lost limbs.

entities.name: Hedron
languages: understands all languages but can't speak

trait.name: Aura of Pure Order
entries: The hedron exudes a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of pure order, which influences randomness and makes the area conform to a rigid ideal. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} penetrates objects and barriers, but a barrier more than 2 feet thick or made of magical force blocks it. An object that remains in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} for 1 minute becomes perfectly geometric, and {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} in the area becomes normal terrain.

A creature other than a hedron that starts its turn in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} or moves there for the first time on a turn takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Force damage. While in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, a creature can't shape-shift or have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} or {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on any roll.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The hedron has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hedron makes three Telekinesis attacks.

action.name: Telekinesis
entries: {@atkr ms} {@hit 6}, reach 60 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) Force damage, unless the hedron chooses to deal half or no damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

Each time the hedron makes a Telekinesis attack against a {@condition Grappled|XPHB} target, it can move the target up to 30 feet in any direction, provided the target remains within 60 feet of the hedron. If the target is an object worn or carried by an unwilling creature, it can prevent the movement with a successful {@dc 14} Strength saving throw. If the hedron deals no damage to the target, it can exert fine control with its telekinetic force, such as manipulating a tool or opening a door.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the hell's reach remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary mushroom.

trait.name: Fiery Body
