entries: A creature that touches the hell's reach or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Fire damage.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 2}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the ring of fire remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary cluster of mushrooms.

trait.name: Fiery Swarm
entries: A creature that touches the ring of fire or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage, or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Fire damage if the ring of fire has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The ring of fire can occupy another creature's space and vice versa. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 0}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 4d4}) Fire damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage if the ring of fire has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

entities.name: Hermit Skull
languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Ambusher
entries: On the first round of combat, the hermit skull has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against surprised creatures.

action.name: Ectoplasmic Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Necrotic damage.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hive haunt makes a Bite attack and a Sting attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 0 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage, or 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the swarm regains an equal number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. The target dies if this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0.

action.name: Sting
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 0 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, or 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.{@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

trait.name: Hive Connection
entries: The hivewolf is connected to other hivewolves within 120 feet by a hivemind, which they use to share information. If the hivewolf is aware of a threat, all hivewolves within 120 feet are also aware of the threat. This effect can penetrate barriers, but 2 feet of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead or barrier of force blocks it.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hivewolf has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hivewolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Hive Connection
entries: The hivewolf matriarch is connected to other hivewolves within 300 feet by a hivemind, which they use to share information. If the hivewolf matriarch is aware of a threat, all hivewolves within 300 feet are also aware of the threat. This effect can penetrate barriers, but 2 feet of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead or barrier of force blocks it.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hivewolf matriarch has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hivewolf matriarch's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage.

action.name: Acid Spray {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The horror flit breeder can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The horror flit breeder can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The horror flit breeder makes three Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Piercing damage. If a Small or larger creature is killed by this damage, a {@creature Horror Flit Swarm|GrimHollowMG24} emerges from its corpse {@dice 1d4} hours later.

reaction.name: Vomit Swarm (Recharges after a Long Rest)
entries: {@actTrigger} The horror flit breeder becomes {@status Bloodied|XPHB}. {@actResponse} The horror flit breeder opens its mouth and vomits a {@creature Horror Flit Swarm|GrimHollowMG24} into a space within 5 feet of it.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The horror flit hunter can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The horror flit hunter can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The horror flit hunter makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage. If a Small or larger creature is killed by this damage, a {@creature Horror Flit Swarm|GrimHollowMG24} emerges from its corpse {@dice 1d4} hours later.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The horror flit swarm can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The horror flit swarm can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The horror flit swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Bites
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 0 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d8}) Piercing damage, or 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Piercing damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition. If a Small or larger creature is killed by this damage, a {@creature Horror Flit Swarm|GrimHollowMG24} emerges from its corpse {@dice 1d4} hours later.

entities.name: Horror-out-the-Box

trait.name: Spring-Heeled Horror
entries: The horror-out-the-box uses its movement to jump up to 50 feet. It takes no falling damage from these jumps.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 30 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Force damage.

bonus.name: Leap
entries: The horror-out-the-box takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} action.

reactionHeader: The horror-out-the-box can take up to three {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} per round but only one per turn.

reaction.name: Thrashing Limbs
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature moves into, out of, or within the horror-out-the-box's reach. {@actResponse} The horror-out-the-box makes a Slam attack against the triggering creature.

entities.name: Hourglass Widow
languages: the languages it knew in life

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The widow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to spell attacks):
footerEntries: *The widow casts these spells before combat.

spellcasting.name: Expeditious Retreat
headerEntries: The widow casts {@spell Expeditious Retreat|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Innate Spellcasting, then takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
headerEntries: The widow casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Innate Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Shield (3/Day)
headerEntries: The widow casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Innate Spellcasting.

trait.name: Accelerate Through Time (2/Day)
entries: The widow takes an extra {@variantrule Action|XPHB} on its turn.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the widow fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Master of Time
entries: The widow chooses whether it is affected by effects that modify time or change its speed. The widow can affect creatures frozen in a {@spell Time Stop|XPHB} spell and other stasis-like effects.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The widow regains 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If it takes Fire or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the widow's next turn. The widow's body is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The widow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against any effect that Turns Undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The widow makes three attacks, using Disintegrating Touch and Withering Gaze in any combination.

action.name: Disintegrating Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}34 ({@damage 8d6 + 6}) Force damage.{@actSave con} {@dc 20}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 15 feet (to a minimum of 0 feet). At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. The effects of multiple Disintegrating Touches are cumulative.

action.name: Withering Gaze
entries: A creature within 30 feet that the widow can see takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage. A creature can only be affected by this attack once per round.

legendary.name: Eldritch Blast
entries: The widow casts {@spell Eldritch Blast|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Sudden Rush
entries: The widow teleports to an unoccupied space within 30 feet of it. It can make a Disintegrating Touch attack before or after it teleports. The widow can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Frozen in Time
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 20}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the widow. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The widow can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the hraptnon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hraptnon has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Undying
entries: Unless the hraptnon's Stillborn Heart is removed from its pool, the hraptnon's death is temporary. One of its countless {@creature Xakalonus|GrimHollowMG24} offspring grows into the hraptnon in 24 hours. The hraptnon loses its Immunities if the Stillborn Heart is removed from the pool.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hraptnon makes three attacks, using Bite, Claw, or Spine in any combination.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Piercing damage.{@actSave con} {@dc 20}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of the hraptnon's next turn.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d10 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Spine
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 11}, range 60 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d8 + 5}) Piercing damage. {@actSave dex} {@dc 20}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} and {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition until it takes an action to remove the spine with a successful {@dc 20} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check.

reaction.name: Spawn Xakalonus
entries: {@actTrigger} The hraptnon takes 20 points of damage or more from a single attack. {@actResponse} The hraptnon spawns a {@creature Xakalonus|GrimHollowMG24} in the nearest unoccupied space. The {@creature Xakalonus|GrimHollowMG24} shares {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} with the hraptnon.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: The hraptnon makes a Claws attack.

legendary.name: Baneful Howl
entries: The hraptnon casts {@spell Bane|XPHB} (level 3 version; spell save {@dc 20}). The hraptnon can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Life Drain
entries: One {@creature Xakalonus|GrimHollowMG24} within 30 feet of the hraptnon dies. The hraptnon regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the xakalonus's remaining {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} when it died. The hraptnon can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

entities.name: Inkwalker
languages: Mimics sounds and voices it has heard

trait.name: Adhesive
entries: The inkwalker adheres to anything that touches it. A Large or smaller creature adhered to the inkwalker has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Ambusher
entries: In the first round of combat, the inkwalker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature it has Surprised.

trait.name: Grappler
entries: The inkwalker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The inkwalker can mimic sounds it has heard, including voices and animal noises. A creature that hears the sound it makes can tell they are imitations with a successful Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) check opposed by the inkwalker's Charisma ({@skill Deception}) check.

trait.name: Wall Walker
entries: The inkwalker can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Acid damage.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is subjected to Adhesive.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The inkwalker shape-shifts into a {@filter CR 1/2 or lower beast|bestiary|source=|Challenge Rating=[&0;&1/2]|type=beast|miscellaneous=} Beast or back into its true, amorphous shape. Its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is transformed.

entities.name: Insic
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The insic casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Amorphous Form
entries: The insic can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing.

trait.name: Turning Endurance
entries: The insic can't be turned by effects that Turn Undead.

action.name: Dissonant Touch
entries: {@atkr ms} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the end of the insic's next turn.

action.name: Possession (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 13}, one creature the insic can see within 5 feet, or one creature touching the instrument the insic inhabits. {@actSaveFail} The target is possessed by the insic. The insic then disappears, and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and loses control of its body. The insic controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The insic has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the target other than those that turn undead. It retains its {@variantrule Alignment|XPHB}, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on a success. After 1 minute, the target can no longer repeat the save. Otherwise, the possession ends if the target is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the insic ends it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, or the insic is turned or magically forced out. When the possession ends, the insic reappears in the nearest unoccupied space. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the Possession of all insics for 24 hours.

trait.name: Slippery Serpent
entries: The ithjar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on ability checks and saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ithjar makes two Bite attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the ithjar can't make Tail attacks against other creatures.

reaction.name: Writhing Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The ithjar becomes {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. {@actResponse} The ithjar makes a Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check to escape.

trait.name: Slippery Serpent
entries: The stormborn ithjar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on ability checks and saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The stormborn ithjar makes three Bite attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Thunder damage, and if the target is Larger or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the stormborn ithjar can't make Tail attacks against other creatures.

action.name: Storm Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Lightning damage plus 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Thunder damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The discharge of this breath is audible for 1 mile outdoors or 300 feet indoors.

reaction.name: Writhing Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The stormborn ithjar becomes {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. {@actResponse} The stormborn ithjar makes a Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check to escape.

trait.name: Corruption Aura
entries: The jespaith corrupts a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, turning it into {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} even after the jespaith moves on. {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, a creature that starts its turn in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Poison damage.

trait.name: Rock Breaker
entries: The jespaith can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB}, but it leaves behind rubble rather than a tunnel.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The jespaith deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Turn Immunity
entries: The jespaith has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to effects that Turn Undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The jespaith makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with Engulf.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 20}). The jespaith can grapple up to four creatures at once.

action.name: Engulf
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 20}, each Huge or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the jespaith. {@actSaveFail} The grapple ends and the target is pulled into the jespaith's body. The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, is suffocating, and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the jespaith. At the start of each of the jespaith's turns, the target takes 23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage. The jespaith can hold only one Huge creature, two Large creatures, or eight Medium or smaller creatures at a time.

The target can escape the jespaith by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 20} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. Escaping the jespaith costs 10 feet of movement and ejects the target into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the jespaith. If the jespaith dies, the target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape without using an action or making a check.
If the target dies while engulfed, its body is broken up and the jespaith keeps anything the target was wearing or carrying inside of it.

action.name: Spit {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 90-foot long, 10-foot wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Acid damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The jungeist has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The jungeist uses Bite once and Arcane Whiskers once.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Piercing damage and 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Arcane Whiskers
entries: The jungeist uses one of the following effects at random, targeting a creature the jungeist can see within 60 feet of itself (roll {@dice 1d4}):

items.name: Eldritch Bolt
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Force damage.

items.name: Fear Blast
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save (with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} if it can sense the jungeist), ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

items.name: Sickening Ray
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the jungeist's next turn.

items.name: Gripping Shadows
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. It automatically escapes after 1 minute.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mausgeist has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mausgeist uses Bite once and Arcane Whiskers once.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Piercing damage and 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The mausgeist shape-shifts into a Small Humanoid or reverts to its true form. Other than its Size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

action.name: Arcane Whiskers
entries: The mausgeist uses one of the following effects at random, targeting a creature the mausgeist can see within 90 feet of itself (roll {@dice 1d6}):

items.name: Eldritch Bolt
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Force damage.

items.name: Fear Blast
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save (with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} if it can sense the mausgeist), ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

items.name: Fire Orb
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Fire damage.

items.name: Gripping Shadows
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. It automatically escapes after 1 minute.

items.name: Hungry Shadows
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the end of the mausgeist's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: Hypnotic Phantasm
entries: Intelligence Saving Throw: {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0. The effect ends early if the target takes damage or a creature takes an action to shake the target out of its stupor.

trait.name: Heated Body
entries: A creature other than a keppmir that ends its turn {@condition Grappled|XPHB|grappling} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the keppmir takes 1 fire damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The keppmir can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The keppmir can breathe only underwater.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage, or 5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) Piercing damage if the spear is wielded in two hands.

trait.name: Ambusher
entries: In the first round of combat, the keppmir stalker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature it has Surprised.

trait.name: Heated Body
entries: A creature other than a keppmir that ends its turn {@condition Grappled|XPHB|grappling} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the keppmir stalker takes 2 Fire damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The keppmir stalker can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The keppmir stalker can breathe only underwater.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The keppmir stalker makes two attacks, using Gore or Spear in any combination.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}96 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage, or 6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage if the spear is wielded in two hands.

trait.name: Brutal Attacks
entries: When the keppmir king scores a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} with a melee weapon attack, it deals an extra die of damage. This damage die isn't doubled.

trait.name: Brute
entries: A melee weapon deals one extra die of damage when the keppmir king hits with it (included in the attack).

trait.name: Heated Body
entries: A creature other than a keppmir that ends its turn {@condition Grappled|XPHB|grappling} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the keppmir king takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The keppmir stalker can hold its breath for 20 minutes.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The keppmir stalker can breathe only underwater.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The keppmir king makes three attacks, using Gore or Spear in any combination.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Force damage.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Force damage, or 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Force damage if the spear is wielded in two hands.

action.name: Boiling Burst {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, or 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} underwater. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Battle Rush
entries: If the keppmir king takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action, he can make a Gore attack as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Knifetooth warlord makes three Spear attacks.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Warlord Strike {@recharge 5}
entries: The Knifetooth warlord makes two Spear attacks, then it commands up to three other Knifetooth Horde members of CR 4 or lower to attack. Each affected creature can a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make an attack against a creature the warlord attacked this turn. The target adds the warlord's proficiency bonus to the damage roll of this attack.

bonus.name: Brutal Inspiration
entries: The Knifetooth warlord lets out a battle cry. Knifetooth Horde members who can see or hear the warlord gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws until the start of the warlord's next turn.

action.name: Fiery Burst
entries: {@atkr ms,rw} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Fire damage, and the Knifetooth firebrand can make the flames leap to another target within 20 feet. The second target takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Firebrand Aura (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The Knifetooth firebrand surrounds itself with an aura of violet flame, shedding {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 10 feet. These flames increase the firebrand's AC by 1.

Whenever a creature within 10 feet of the firebrand hits it with an attack, the flames leap to the attacker, dealing 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage to it. Violet flame outlines a creature struck by this fire, so the creature can't have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition until it leaves the aura. This aura lasts for 10 minutes, until the firebrand dies or has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, or until the firebrand ends it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

reaction.name: Terrifying Flames
entries: {@actTrigger} The Knifetooth firebrand's Firebrand Aura deals Fire damage to a creature. {@actResponse} {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, the damaged creature. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Brutal Attacks
entries: When the Knifetooth slayer scores a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} with a melee weapon attack, it deals an extra die of damage. This damage die isn't doubled.

trait.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of its turn, the Knifetooth slayer can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on melee weapon attack rolls until the start of its next turn, but attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} until then.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Knifetooth slayer makes two Greatsword attacks. If it misses with either attack, it can use Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The Knifetooth hunter deals an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the hunter that doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, and the hunter doesn't have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

action.name: Handaxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage, or 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Slashing damage if the attack was made as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Devious Warrior
entries: The Knifetooth hunter takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action. If it has a handaxe in each hand, it can instead make a {@item Handaxe|XPHB} attack.

spellcasting.name: Counterspell
headerEntries: The kokela casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} (level 5 version) in response to that spell's trigger. Charisma is its spellcasting ability for this spell.

trait.name: Eldritch Distortion
entries: Each time the kokela is targeted by a {@spell Magic Missile|XPHB} spell, a {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line} spell, or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll a {@dice d6}. On a 1–3, the kokela is affected normally. On a 4–6, the effect rebounds at the caster as if it originated from the kokela.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: f the kokela fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Nightmare Aura
entries: The kokela emits a 150-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} that looks like whatever horrid, squirming vista it dreams of. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} can conceal danger. A creature moving through the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} can take the {@action Study|XPHB} action to see through the illusion with a successful {@dc 20} Intelligence ({@skill Investigation}) check. Those who succeed on this check see the dream world vaguely superimposed over the real terrain. Such creatures have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against the Nightmare Aura and against the kokela's Alien Sun reaction.

A creature that enters the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 20}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. If the target is within 20 feet of the kokela, it also takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Psychic damage and its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved for the same duration.
If a creature drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in the aura, one of its ears detaches and flies away.

trait.name: Sound Reliant
entries: While the kokela has the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and can't use Hum or Swarm Song.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The kokela makes two Slam attacks and uses Hum.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 20 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 5d8 + 3}) Force damage.

action.name: Hum
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 20}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. This vibration transcends hearing, ignoring magical silence and affecting creatures with the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition normally. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Thunder damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: The kokela makes a Slam attack.

legendary.name: Dream Movement
entries: The kokela teleports up to 60 feet. It can arrive in a space occupied by other creatures, shunting the creatures into the nearest unoccupied spaces.

legendary.name: Swarm Song {@recharge}
entries: The kokela calls for a {@creature Swarm of Ears|GrimHollowMG24}, which rolls {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} and arrives next round in an unoccupied space within 90 feet of the kokela.

legendary.name: Alien Sun (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 20}, each creature in the kokela's Nightmare Aura. {@actSaveFail} 39 ({@damage 6d12}) Radiant damage, and the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition on itself on a success. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Laethlyn casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}):

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Laethlyn fails a saving throw, they can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Laethlyn has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Nature Speech
entries: The Laethlyn can understand and be understood by all Beasts and Plants.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Laethlyn makes three Vine Strike attacks.

action.name: Vine Strike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 15 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Force damage. If another creature is within 5 feet of the target, the Laethlyn can attack both targets at once, using the same attack roll for both.

action.name: Thorn Spray
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20}, each non-Plant in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 50 ({@damage 8d10 + 6}) Force damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet for 1 minute or until the target receives magical healing. Further reductions to the creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} from Thorn Spray are cumulative. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Slash
entries: The Laethlyn uses Vine Strike.

legendary.name: Teleport
entries: The Laethlyn magically teleports, along with anything she is wearing or carrying, up to 90 feet to an unoccupied space she can see.

legendary.name: Vine Capture
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20}, a creature the Laethlyn can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The Laethlyn can capture two creatures at a time. The Laethlyn can't use this action again until the start of her next turn.

legendary.name: Rejuvenate
entries: The Laethlyn roots themself in the ground beneath them, reducing their {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} to 0 until she teleports or takes an action to uproot themself. While rooted, healing energy surges into her, restoring 30 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of her turns. Any Beast allies within 30 feet of the Laethlyn regain 30 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} when she takes this action. The Laethlyn can't take this action again until the start of her next turn.

entities.name: Mouruge
languages: the languages it knew in life

trait.name: Undead Fortitude
entries: If damage reduces the mouruge to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it must make a Constitution saving throw (DC of 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or Cold, or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. On a successful save, the mouruge drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mouruge makes one Bite attack and one Slam attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

entities.name: Kindled Mouruge
languages: the languages it knew in life

trait.name: Holy Water Vulnerability
entries: The kindled mouruge takes double damage from {@item Holy Water|XPHB}.

trait.name: Undead Fortitude
entries: If damage reduces the kindled mouruge to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it must make a Constitution saving throw (DC of 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or Cold, or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. On a successful save, the kindled mouruge drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The kindled mouruge makes two attacks, using Bite or Slam in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Soul Fire.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Soul Fire {@recharge 4}
entries: {@atkr ms,rs} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or ranged 30 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Fire damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. If the target isn't a Construct, it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the flames, the target takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage at the end of each of its turns.

spellcasting.name: Beast Whispers
headerEntries: The laneshi soldier casts {@spell Speak with Animals|XPHB}, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The laneshi soldier can breathe air and water.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The laneshi soldier makes two melee Pike attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Net.

action.name: Pike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Net
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 11}, one Large or smaller creature the laneshi soldier can see within 15 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The target can take an action to free itself or another creature trapped by a Net with a successful {@dc 10} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check. Dealing 5 Slashing damage to the Net (AC 10) frees the target and destroys the Net.

bonus.name: Skirmisher
entries: The laneshi soldier takes the {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The laneshi necromancer casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, +6 to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Healing Word (3/Day)
headerEntries: The laneshi necromancer casts {@spell Healing Word|XPHB}, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The laneshi necromancer can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Death Strike (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: When the laneshi necromancer hits with a melee attack, the target takes 27 ({@damage 5d10}) Necrotic damage in addition to the attack's effects. A Humanoid slain by this damage rises at the start of the necromancer's next turn as a zombie under the necromancer's command.

trait.name: Duality of Spirit
entries: The laneshi necromancer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws and spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Necrotic Mastery
entries: Necrotic damage dealt by the laneshi necromancer ignores {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The laneshi necromancer makes two attacks, using Spear or Ghostly Hand in any combination.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Ghostly Hand
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 60 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d10}) Necrotic damage, and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the end of the laneshi necromancer's next turn.

entities.name: Leeching Willow
languages: understands Deep Speech and all languages those infected by it knew but it cannot speak

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The leeching willow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Bell Weakness
entries: A bell rung within 30 feet of the tree forces it to uproot, disrupting its False Appearance and suppressing the effects of its Leeching Spores. A loud bell rung near a creature kills any Leeching Spores inside of it.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the leeching willow remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.

trait.name: Leeching Spores
entries: TThe leeching willow emits spores from its body in a 1,000-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Each creature that breathes in the leeching willow's spores is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} The spores take root in the target's body, infecting it. {@actSaveSuccess} The creature is immune to being infected for 1 minute, but still has spores inside its body.

An infected target's body feeds vigor to the leeching willow. The target gets minimal rest from sleeping, suffering a level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} every 7 days (to a maximum of 4 levels of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB}). These {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} levels can't be removed by taking a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} until the spores are removed from the creature's body.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The leeching willow deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The leeching willow makes three attacks, using Slam or Rock in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Psychic Spike.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 5d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 60/180 ft. {@h}28 ({@damage 4d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage

action.name: Psychic Spike
entries: Intelligence Saving Throw: {@dc 18}, one creature with Leeching Spores in its body. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 5d10}) Psychic damage, and the target can't take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} until the end of its next turn. On the target's next turn, it must choose whether it can move, take an action, or take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}; it only gets one of the three. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Psychic Slam (1/Day)
entries: The leeching willow uses Psychic Spike against each creature with Leeching Spores in its body within 1,000 feet. This special use of Psychic Spike deals 45 ({@damage 13d6}) Psychic damage, kills any Leeching Spores in the target's body, and suppresses the leeching willow's Leeching Spores trait for 1 round. If this damage kills a target, its head explodes, if it has one.

trait.name: Berserk
entries: Whenever the lenchtahg starts its turn with the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition, roll a {@dice d6}. On a 1, the lenchtahg recalls its former life and current agony, going berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the lenchtahg attacks the nearest creature it can see. It treats all creatures as {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} and makes any {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} it can. Also, it has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, but all attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the lenchtahg moves as far as it can toward the closest creature.

Once the lenchtahg goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it loses the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition. A Fiend can take an action to calm the lenchtahg with a successful {@dc 15} Charisma ({@skill Persuasion}) check, suppressing this trait for 10 minutes.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The lenchtahg has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Radiant Absorption
entries: Whenever the lenchtahg is targeted by Radiant damage from a source other than a lenchtahg, it takes no damage and instead regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the Radiant damage dealt.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If the lenchtahg's head survives its demise, the lenchtahg reappears in 6 days in a fiery explosion. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the lenchtahg when it rejuvenates. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6)} Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

If the lenchtahg's severed head is targeted by a {@spell Dispel Evil and Good|XPHB} spell or doused in holy water and ritually consecrated in a 1-hour ritual, it doesn't rejuvenate. The head can't rejuvenate on consecrated ground, like that created by a holy {@spell Hallow|XPHB} spell.

trait.name: Water Aversion
entries: If drenched in 5 gallons or more of water, or any amount of {@item Holy Water|XPHB}, the lenchtahg has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lenchtahg makes two attacks, using Claw or Radiant Gaze in any combination.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Radiant Gaze
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, one creature the lenchtahg can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Radiant damage. {@variantrule Cover|XPHB} provides the target no benefit for this save.

entities.name: Lich Troll
languages: the languages it knew in life and Giant

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The lich troll casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}, +8 to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
headerEntries: The lich troll casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (4/Day)
headerEntries: The lich troll casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} (level 4 version) or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
entries: If the lich troll fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The lich troll regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the lich troll takes Acid or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function until the start of the lich troll's next turn. The lich troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lich troll makes three attacks, using Claw, Frost Beam, or Grave Beam in any combination.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Cold damage.

action.name: Frost Beam
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, reach 60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Cold damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the lich troll's next turn.

action.name: Grave Beam
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, reach 60 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d10)}) Necrotic damage, and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the end of the lich troll's next turn.

legendary.name: Evasive Attack
entries: The lich troll uses {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} and makes a Claw, Frost Beam, or Grave Beam attack. If it is out of uses of {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, it just makes the attack.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The zombie troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the zombie troll takes Acid or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function until the start of the zombie troll's next turn. The zombie troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The zombie troll makes two Morningstar attacks. If a target is hit by both attacks, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Morningstar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Disease {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB}
entries: The lindwyrm has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to all nonmagical diseases.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the lindwyrm fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lindwyrm makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. It can replace one Claw attack with Swallow.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 15 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the lindwyrm can't Bite another target. {@actSave con} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The lindwyrm makes one Bite attack against a Huge or smaller creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} with its Bite. {@h} The target takes the Bite attack's Piercing damage (but not the Poison damage), no longer has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition, and is swallowed. While swallowed, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the lindwyrm. It takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Acid damage at the start of each of the lindwyrm's turns. The lindwyrm can only have one target swallowed at a time.

If the lindwyrm takes 40 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the lindwyrm must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which lands in a space within 10 feet of the lindwyrm and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the lindwyrm dies, the swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Claw Attack
entries: The lindwyrm makes a Claw attack.

legendary.name: Burrowing Rush
entries: The lindwyrm burrows up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, coming up beneath a target touching the ground and making a Bite attack against it. This movement doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}. The lindwyrm can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

entities.name: Lithobel
languages: understands Infernal and the languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Two Heads
entries: The lithobel has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, or {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} conditions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lithobel makes four attacks using Battleaxe, Mace, Shield Bash, or Spear in any combination.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d8 + 5}) Force damage.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Force damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Shield Bash
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Force damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it is pushed 10 feet away from the lithobel.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Force damage. {@hom} If thrown, the spear reappears in the lithobel's hand immediately after the attack.

bonus.name: Rampage
entries: After reducing a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a melee attack, the lithobel moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a melee attack.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the lithobel can see hits it with an attack. {@actResponse} The lithobel adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The living toxin can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Toxic Nature
entries: When the living toxin or the host of its Toxic Invasion is subjected to an effect that ends the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition, the living toxin takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage per level of the effect, if any.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). Until this grapple ends, the living toxin can't Touch another target.

action.name: Toxic Invasion
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, a creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the living toxin. {@actSaveFail} The living toxin invades the target's body. While inside a host, the living toxin has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the host. The host has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and takes 10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Poison damage at the start of each of the living toxin's turns.

At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. The effect ends early if the host dies or is subjected to any effect that ends the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. When the effect ends, the living toxin leaves the host, landing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet.

entities.name: Lupilisk
languages: can learn languages but can't speak

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The lupilisk has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lupilisk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. First {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. At the end of its next turn, the target repeats the save. Second {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. After 24 hours, the target repeats the save. Third {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition permanently. If the target succeeds on any of its saves, the effect ends for it.

entities.name: Lupilisk Elder
languages: can learn languages but can't speak

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The lupilisk has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lupilisk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. At the end of its next turn, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition permanently instead of the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Pack Attack {@recharge 5}
entries: One lupilisk or lupilisk whelp the lupilisk elder can see within 30 feet can use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make a Bite attack. The target must be able to see or hear the lupilisk elder. Then the lupilisk elder makes a Bite attack.

entities.name: Lupilisk Whelp
languages: can learn languages but can't speak

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The lupilisk has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lupilisk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Poison damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. At the end of its next turn, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. The effect ends after 1 minute.

trait.name: Grappler
entries: The werewolf has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against {@condition Grappled|XPHB} targets. Its attacks deal an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage against a creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The werewolf makes two melee attacks, using Claw or Shortsword in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

action.name: Bite (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition. If the target is a Humanoid, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it gains the {@charoption Lycanthrope|GrimHollowPG24|Lycanthrope Transformation}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this werewolf's curse for 24 hours.

action.name: Claw (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m}

{@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) if it is Medium or smaller. It can grapple one creature at a time, and it cannot use Claw attacks against other targets when grappling a creature.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The werewolf shape-shifts into a wolf-humanoid hybrid or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Any armor it is wearing merges into its hybrid form.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The werebear casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, +6 to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Healing Word (3/Day)
headerEntries: The werebear casts {@spell Healing Word|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The werebear makes three Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite

action.name: Bite (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Humanoid, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it gains the {@charoption Lycanthrope|GrimHollowPG24|Lycanthrope Transformation}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this werebear's curse for 24 hours.

action.name: Claw (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The werebear shape-shifts into a bear-humanoid hybrid, a bear, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Any armor it is wearing merges into its hybrid form.

The werebear's kindred bear form is a Large bear. In this form, it can speak to and understand bears, can't take any {@variantrule Action|XPHB|Actions} that require hands, and adds its Constitution modifier to any saving throw it makes. The werebear gains 25 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} the first time it assumes its bear form each day. In bear form, it uses the same attacks as the Hybrid form.

trait.name: Earthbound
entries: The lyfaren must stay surrounded by earth. If the lyfaren starts its turn with its entire Gargantuan body removed from the ground, it takes 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Force damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lyfaren uses Bite, and if it has a creature grappled, it uses Swallow.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 15 ft. {@h}42 ({@damage 8d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}).

action.name: Swallow
entries: The lyfaren swallows a creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it. While swallowed, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects originating from outside the lyfaren, and the target takes 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the lyfaren's turns. A lyfaren can have up to four Large or smaller creatures swallowed at a time.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing.

trait.name: Corrode Magic
entries: Any magical weapon that hits the ooze has some of its magic stripped away. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a cumulative −1 penalty to attack and damage rolls. If the penalty reaches −3, the weapon permanently becomes a mundane version of that weapon type. A weapon affected by this magical draining reduces the penalty by 1 every 24 hours. Magical ammunition that hits the ooze becomes mundane immediately after dealing damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the ooze remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an oily pool or wet rock.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Force damage. If the target is wearing magical armor, the armor is stripped of some power and takes a cumulative −1 penalty to the AC it offers. If the penalty reaches −3, the armor permanently becomes a mundane version of that armor type. Armor affected by this magical draining reduces the penalty by 1 every 24 hours.

reaction.name: Feed
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature deals damage to the ooze with a spell. {@actResponse} The ooze reduces the damage dealt by that attack to 0, and instead regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the amount of damage it would've taken.

trait.name: Enamoring Scent
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the maiden's hair is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. Every minute, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 hour. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the maiden hair's Enamoring Scent for 24 hours.

While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} conditions. The target uses its movement on each of its turns to approach the maiden's hair. It doesn't avoid danger, but before moving into damaging terrain and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the maiden's hair, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.
A strong wind (such as one created by {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}) suppresses the scent for the wind's duration.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the maiden's hair remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary plant.

action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and takes 6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns, and the maiden's hair can't make Tendril attacks against other creatures.

trait.name: Enamoring Scent
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the maiden's hair is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. Every minute, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 hour. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the maiden hair's Enamoring Scent for 24 hours.

While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} conditions. The target uses its movement on each of its turns to approach the maiden's hair. It doesn't avoid danger, but before moving into damaging terrain and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the maiden's hair, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. A strong wind (such as one created by {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}) suppresses the scent for the wind's duration.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the maiden's hair remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary plant.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The maiden's hair makes two tendril attacks.

action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and takes 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns. The maiden's hair can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The malcinder makes two attacks, using Claw or Tail Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the malcinder moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and the malcinder can make a Bite attack against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Tail Flame
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or ranged 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Fiery Body
entries: A creature that touches the malcinder alpha or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Pack Leader
entries: The malcinder alpha and each {@creature malcinder|GrimHollowMG24} within 30 feet of it gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attacks against a creature if at least one other allied malcinder is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The malcinder alpha makes three attacks, using Claw or Tail Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the malcinder alpha moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and the malcinder alpha can make a Bite attack against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Tail Flame
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or ranged 30/120 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Fire damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The malefic broker casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Shield (1/Day)
headerEntries: The malefic broker casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} (level 1) in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The malefic broker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Soul Shards
entries: The malefic broker has six soul shards. It can cast an expended spell from Spellcasting or Shield by spending soul shards equal to the spell's level, as listed in those actions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The malefic broker uses Mindfire twice and Puppeteer once.

action.name: Mindfire
entries: {@atkr ms,rs} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Fire damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage, and the target ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the target, it takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage and 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage at the start of each of its turns.

action.name: Puppeteer
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, one creature the malefic broker can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of the malefic broker's turn. The target must immediately use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make an attack or cast a damaging cantrip against a creature or object of the broker's choice. If the target is ignited by Mindfire, its attack or cantrip deals an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage.

reaction.name: Soul Siphon
entries: {@actTrigger} A living creature dies within 30 feet of the malefic broker. {@actResponse} The malefic broker gains one soul shard.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The imp casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Creeping Corruption
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the imp is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 12} (a creature with {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition automatically succeeds). First {@actSaveFail} The creature acts in accordance with its most selfish, venal, and ruthless impulses to the best of its ability. After 24 hours, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second {@actSaveFail} The compulsion lasts until removed by a {@spell Remove Curse|XPHB} spell or similar magic.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The imp has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit -1}, reach 0 ft. {@h}1 ({@damage 1d4 - 2}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 10}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The marra casts one of the following spells, requiring no components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The marra has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marra makes three Claws attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Crushing Presence.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Crushing Presence
entries: {@atkr ms} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one {@condition Prone|XPHB} creature. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Psychic damage and the marra enters the target's space and sits on its chest. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) and is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. First {@actSaveFail} While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. If the target is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB} at the end of its next turn, it repeats the save. Second {@actSaveFail} While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Until the grapple ends, the target takes 13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Psychic damage at the end of each of the target's turns.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The marra shape-shifts into a Tiny moth or back into its true form. In moth form, the marra has a {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} of 5 feet, a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Flying Speed} of 40 feet, and can't speak. Otherwise, its game statistics are the same in each form. Anything the marra is wearing or carrying transforms with it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The maskenmagier casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Counterspell (3/Day)
headerEntries: The maskenmagier casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Devour Soul
entries: maskenmagier can consume the soul of a Humanoid it has killed in the past hour by spending 10 minutes adjacent to its corpse. The target's soul is trapped in the maskenmagier for 24 hours. If the maskenmagier dies or the soul is raised from the dead before this duration ends, the soul is freed. Otherwise, it is digested and no mortal magic can restore it. The maskenmagier can digest only one soul at a time.
After digesting a soul, the maskenmagier gains a soul mask in the likeness of the devoured soul. The maskenmagier can use this mask with its Shape-Shift action for 13 days.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The maskenmagier has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Teleport {@recharge 4}
entries: As its movement, the maskenmagier can teleport to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The maskenmagier makes three attacks, using Claws or Soul Bolt in any combination

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Soul Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, reach 60 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d12}) Necrotic damage, or 39 ({@damage 6d12}) Necrotic damage while the maskenmagier is digesting a soul. The target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the start of the maskenmagier's next turn.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The maskenmagier shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or reverts to its true form. Other than its Size, its game statistics are the same in each form.
