If the maskenmagier has a soul mask in the likeness of the Humanoid it is shape-shifting into, it gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Charisma ({@skill Deception}) checks to impersonate the Humanoid and instinctively knows the Humanoid's quirks and behaviors. Besides the soul mask, any equipment the maskenmagier is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

bonus.name: Quick Casting
entries: The maskenmagier makes a Soul Bolt attack or casts an at-will spell from Spellcasting.

trait.name: Rider's Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The outlaw deals an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the outlaw that doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and the outlaw doesn't have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll. The outlaw can also deal this extra damage if it has moved 20+ feet this turn before making the attack, including on a mount.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Blackpowder Pistol
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 25/100 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Mobile
entries: Both the outlaw and its mount takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

reaction.name: Uncanny Riding
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the outlaw can see hits it or its mount with an attack. {@actResponse} The outlaw halves the attack's damage against itself or its mount.

trait.name: Opening Shot
entries: If the master outlaw hits a target with a ranged weapon attack during the first round of combat, it has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes against the same target before the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Rider's Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The master outlaw deals an extra 21 ({@damage 6d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the master outlaw that doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and the master outlaw doesn't have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll. The master outlaw can also deal this extra damage if it has moved 20+ feet this turn before making the attack, including on a mount.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The master outlaw makes two attacks, using Rapier or Blackpowder Pistol in any combination.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Blackpowder Pistol
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 25/100 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Mobile
entries: Both the master outlaw and its mount take the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

bonus.name: Quick Loader
entries: The master outlaw loads a bullet into its Blackpowder Pistol or another ranged weapon with the {@itemProperty LD|XPHB|Loading} property.

reaction.name: Uncanny Riding
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the master outlaw can see hits it or its mount with an attack. {@actResponse} The master outlaw halves the attack's damage against itself or its mount.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The plague doctor casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Good Medicine (1/Day)
entries: The plague doctor carries a concoction that, if consumed as an action, restores 13 ({@dice 3d8}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and cures any disease.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Bad Medicine
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 10- foot {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the plague doctor can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage each time it takes an action. The target can take an action to repeat the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The plague doctor casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Conditioned Immunity
entries: The plague doctor has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to disease and {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Good Medicine (2/Day)
entries: The plague doctor carries a concoction that, if consumed as an action, restores 22 ({@dice 5d8}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and cures any disease.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Bad Medicine
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 10- foot {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the plague doctor can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target takes 9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns and 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage each time it takes an action. The target can take an action to repeat the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

entities.name: Memori Lich

trait.name: Action Surge (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The memori lich can take an extra {@variantrule Action|XPHB} on its turn.

trait.name: Fast Healing
entries: While {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the memori lich regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. This trait doesn't function while the lich has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Immutable
entries: No effect can alter the memori lich's form.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the memori lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If destroyed while its memento skull remains intact, the memori lich reforms in {@dice 2d4} days, regaining all of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Its new body appears within 5 feet of the memento skull.

trait.name: Superior Critical
entries: The memori lich scores a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 18, 19, or 20 on the d20.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The memori lich is immune to effects that Turn Undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The memori lich uses Stunning Presence and makes four Greatsword attacks. It can replace one attack with Wall of Fire.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Slashing damage and 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Force damage.

action.name: Stunning Presence
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 120-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the memori lich that is aware of it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the memori lich's Stunning Presence for 24 hours.

action.name: Wall of Fire {@recharge 5}
entries: The memori lich casts {@spell Wall of Fire|XPHB} (level 6 version; spell save {@dc 16}). This special casting of the spell doesn't require {@status Concentration|XPHB} and lasts until the start of the memori lich's next turn.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the memori lich can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The memori lich regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: The memori lich makes a Greatsword attack.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The memori lich moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Binding Curse
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one creature the memori lich can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. While cursed, the target can't move more than 30 feet from the memori lich and takes an extra 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage from the memori lich's attacks. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. The effect ends early if the memori lich dies or has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. If the target dies while cursed, the memori lich regains 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The memori lich can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Siphon Vitality {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the memori lich. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. The memori lich can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The meyana makes one Bite attack and one Greatclub attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage, or 10 ({@damage 4d4}) Acid damage if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the meyana. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). Until the grapple ends, the meyana can't Bite another target.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the meyana. If the target is Small or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 11}). Until the grapple ends, the meyana can't Bite another target.

trait.name: Fiery Body
entries: A creature that touches the mjork or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The mjork sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius.

trait.name: Smoke Sense
entries: A mjork in contact with smoke has {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} in that smoke's area, to a range of 120 feet.

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the mjork moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, the mjork takes 1 Cold damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mjork makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage and 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Fiery Body
entries: A creature that touches the mjork charger or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The mjork charger sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius.

trait.name: Momentum
entries: If the mjork charger moves on its turn before attacking, creatures have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} against it until the end of its turn.

trait.name: Smoke Sense
entries: A mjork charger in contact with smoke has {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} in that smoke's area, to a range of 120 feet.

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the mjork charger moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, the mjork charger takes 1 Cold damage

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mjork chargermakes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage. If mjork charger moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Bludgeoning damage and 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage and, if it is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Fiery Body
entries: A creature that touches the mjork burner or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Fire Path
entries: The mjork burner leaves fire behind in any space it moves through. Until the start of the mjork's next turn, a creature that enters the space for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage. The fire can ignite flammable objects, extending Fire Path's duration.

trait.name: Ignite
entries: A creature or flammable object that takes Fire damage from the mjork burner's attacks starts burning.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The mjork burner sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius.

trait.name: Smoke Sense
entries: A mjork burner in contact with smoke has {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} in that smoke's area, to a range of 120 feet.

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the mjork burner moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, the mjork burner takes 1 Cold damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mjork burner makes two attacks, using Slam or Hurl Fire in any combination..

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage, and the target is subjected to Ignite.

action.name: Hurl Fire
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 5}, ranged 30/60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Fire damage, and the target is subjected to Ignite.

trait.name: Blinding Soot
entries: A creature that takes Fire damage from the mjork asher's attacks is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of the mjork asher's next turn.

trait.name: Fiery Body
entries: A creature that touches the mjork asher or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Smoke Sense
entries: A mjork asher in contact with smoke has {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} in that smoke's area, to a range of 120 feet.

trait.name: Smoke Shroud
entries: While the mjork asher isn't {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, it emits a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of smoke. The smoke spreads around corners and leaves its area {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB}. Even while the mjork asher is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, tendrils of smoke extend up to 60 feet away, providing mjorks in the area with Smoke Sense. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} is suppressed by strong wind (like that created by {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}).

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the mjork asher moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, the mjork asher takes 1 Cold damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mjork asher makes two attacks, using Slam and Hurl Soot in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage, and the target is subjected to Blinding Soot.

action.name: Hurl Soot
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 5}, ranged 30/60 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 3d6 + 2}) Fire damage, and the target is subjected to Blinding Soot.

action.name: Create Sootlings (1/Day)
entries: The mjork asher creates a 20-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} of smoke centered on a point it can sense within 60 feet. The {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} spreads around corners and leaves its area {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB}. The smoke lasts until the start of the mjork asher's next turn or until dispersed by a strong wind.

If the smoke isn't dispersed before the duration ends, a mjork sootling swarm forms in a space in the area, favoring a space occupied by a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature. The swarm takes its turn just after the mjork asher and obeys the mjork asher's verbal commands (no {@variantrule Action|XPHB} required). If issued no commands, it uses its turns to attack {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creatures.

entities.name: Mjork Sootling Swarm
languages: understands Primordial (Ignan) and Primordial (Terran) but can't speak

trait.name: Hot Soot
entries: A creature that ends its turn in the sootling swarm's space takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage, or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Fire damage if the sootling swarm is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, and is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition and is suffocating until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Smoke Sense
entries: A sootling swarm in contact with smoke has {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} in that smoke's area, to a range of 120 feet.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The sootling swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the sootling swarm moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, the sootling swarm takes 2 Cold damage.

action.name: Burns
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 0 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 4d4}) Fire damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage if the sootling swarm is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

entities.name: Mjork Sootling
languages: understands Primordial (Ignan) and Primordial (Terran) but can't speak

trait.name: Heated Body
entries: A creature that ends its turn in a grapple with the sootling takes 1 Fire damage.

trait.name: Smoke Sense
entries: A mjork sootling in contact with smoke has {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} in that smoke's area, to a range of 120 feet.

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the mjork sootling moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, the mjork sootling takes 1 Cold damage.

action.name: Burn
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Fire damage.

variant.name: Sootling Familiar
entries: Sootlings that have become familiars have the following trait.

entries.name: Familiar
entries: A sootling can partner with another creature as a familiar, forming a telepathic bond with this willing partner. While the two are bonded, the partner can sense what the sootling senses while they are within 1 mile of each other. If the partner harms the sootling, the sootling ends the telepathic bond and ceases being a familiar.

trait.name: Carrier
entries: The morbus kobold can contract a disease but has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to its effects, other than cosmetic symptoms. It has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Infection
entries: A creature that touches the morbus kobold or anything it has touched in the past 24 hours is exposed to a disease, usually {@disease Sewer Plague|XDMG}.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The morbus kobold has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the morbus kobold has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, as well as Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage, and the target is subjected to Infection

action.name: Sling
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is subjected to Infection.

action.name: Gore Bag
entries: The morbus kobold throws its sack of diseased gore at a point it can see within 20 feet. Each creature in a 5-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} of the bag when it bursts is subjected to Infection. A morbus kobold usually only carries one such bag at a time.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The morbus kobold casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The morbus kobold elder can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Carrier
entries: The morbus kobold can contract a disease but has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to its effects, other than cosmetic symptoms. It has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition

trait.name: Infection
entries: A creature that touches the morbus kobold or anything it has touched in the past 24 hours is exposed to a disease, usually {@disease Sewer Plague|XDMG}.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The morbus kobold has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the morbus kobold has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, as well as Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage and the target is subjected to Infection

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The mothfolk has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put it to sleep.

trait.name: Disaster Sense
entries: The mothfolk has a natural understanding of when disaster may strike. The mothfolk has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Initiative rolls and Dexterity saving throws against effects it can see. The mothfolk can't be {@status Surprised|XPHB}.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The mothfolk doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mothfolk makes two Kick attacks.

action.name: Kick
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Mothfolk Curse
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, one creature the mothfolk can see within 300 feet (a {@condition Blinded|XPHB} creature automatically succeeds). {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Mothfolk Curse of all mothfolk for 24 hours. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. While cursed, the target the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions, treating any mothfolk as the effect's source. The target's eyes turn red, and it gains the following compulsion: "Get me away from those monsters hiding everywhere!"

After 1 minute, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success but making the curse's duration unlimited on a failure. A {@spell Remove Curse|XPHB}, {@spell Lesser Restoration|XPHB}, or similar spell removes the curse.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the mud zombie remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an oozing pile of corpse parts.

trait.name: Formless
entries: The mud zombie can move through an opening large enough for a Small creature without squeezing.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The mud zombie can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

reaction.name: Split
entries: {@actTrigger} The mud zombie is Medium or larger, has at least 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and takes 10 damage at once. {@actResponse} The mud zombie splits into two new mud zombies. Each new zombie has {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the original zombie's (round down). New zombies are one size smaller than the original zombie.

items.name: Grasping Hand
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, {@homebrew ranged 30 ft.} {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) {@homebrew Slashing} damage. A hand continues to claw at the targeted creature for that damage each round until the target escapes the claw (escape {@dc 13}).

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mukad has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The mukad can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage plus 1 Poison damage

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The mukad worker can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The mukad worker can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB|Burrowing Speed}. When it burrows, it leaves a 5-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mukad worker makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Poison damage, and if the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

If the target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it is Stable but has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 hour and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it is no longer {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Multiattack

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Aetheric Scream {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, each non-Aberration in a 30-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. The {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} spreads around corners. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage, and the target can't take Reactions until the end of the mukad droner's next turn.

bonus.name: Aetheric Drone
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, each non-Aberration in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the target is fighting the mukad droner). {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks made to perceive any creature other than the mukad droner. The effect ends if the mukad droner has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition or doesn't extend its duration as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on each of its turns.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The swarm has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The larva swarm can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The larva swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Bites
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6 + 1}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, or 4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage if the larva swarm is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

If the target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it is Stable but has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 hour and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it is no longer {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}.

entries: The mukad has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Psychic Defender
entries: Any non-Aberration that starts its turn within 10 feet of the mukad warrior is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target can't attack any creature other than the mukad warrior, another mukad with this trait, or another creature compelling the target to attack it.

entries: The mukad warrior can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The mukad warrior can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB|Burrowing Speed}. When it burrows, it leaves a 5-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Poison damage, and if the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

If the target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it is Stable but has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 hour and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it is no longer {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Psychic Distraction
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the mukad warrior can sense within 30 feet makes an attack roll against a creature that isn't a mukad warrior or another creature compelling the creature to attack it. {@actResponse} The mukad warrior imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the target's roll. If the target has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition, this {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} fails.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The mukad has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The mukad progenitor can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The mukad progenitor can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB|Burrowing Speed}. When it burrows, it leaves a 5-foot diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mukad progenitor makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage, and if the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

If the target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it is Stable but has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 hour and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it is no longer {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Aetheric Blast {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 13}, each non-Aberration in a 30-foot Cone. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 3d10 + 2}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Aetheric Incubation
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 14}, a {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} creature within reach of the mukad progenitor. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition for 24 hours. An ectoplasmic substance harmlessly cocoons the target. Removing the cocoon takes 1 minute, and escaping it from within takes no effort. If the cocoon remains for 13 ({@dice 3d8}) hours, a number of mukad larvae equal to 1d4 + the target's Intelligence bonus appear on the creature, absorbing the cocoon and attacking the target, feeding on it.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The nacambra has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Stench
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the nacambra is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all nacambras for 1 hour.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the nacambra has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Sure-Footed
entries: The nacambra has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength and Dexterity saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Shadow Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). Until the grapple ends, the nacambra can't Shadow Bite another target, but it can make Shadow Bite attacks against the target as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Tail Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 3d4 + 2}) Slashing damage. {@actSave con} 13. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Shadow Shroud
entries: Provided its in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the nacambra becomes {@condition Invisible|XPHB} until it attacks or until its {@status Concentration|XPHB} ends. Any equipment the nacambra wears or carries is {@condition Invisible|XPHB} with it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The nacambraan sorcerer casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
headerEntries: The nacambraan sorcerer casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Counterspell (2/Day)
headerEntries: The nacambraan sorcerer casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

action.name: Nacambraan Dagger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Piercing damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Poison damage.

action.name: Toxic Splash
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: {@dc 14}, each creature in a 5-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Acid damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Quick Cantrip
entries: The nacambraan sorcerer uses Toxic Splash or casts an at-will spell from Spellcasting.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The nether spider can climb on difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The nether spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage and 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If this damage kills the target, its body reduces to hot ashy sludge.

action.name: Web {@recharge 5}
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/60 ft. {@h} The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@hom} The nether spider creates a 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} of webbing centered on the target (AC 10; HP 10; {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Cold damage; {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Fire, Poison, and Psychic damage). The webbing creates magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} and {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for 1 minute. This {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} dispels magical light created by a spell of level 2 or lower.

trait.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: While in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, the night serpent has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Necrotic damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 9}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until the end of the night serpent's next turn.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the night serpent can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Painkiller
entries: While the nolid is {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The nolid has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The nolid uses its Startling Howl, then makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Startling Howl
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 30- foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the nolid that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the nolid's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Startling Howl of all nolids for 24 hours.

trait.name: Painkiller
entries: While the nolidir is {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The nolid uses its Terrifying Howl, then makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Terrifying Howl
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 60- foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the nolid that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save (with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} if it can see the nolidir), ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the Terrifying Howl of all nolidirs for 24 hours.

trait.name: Shadow Leap
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the oblivion leaper can use its movement to teleport to another space in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}. Every foot of teleportation costs the oblivion leaper 1 foot of movement.

trait.name: Sunlight Weakness
entries: While in sunlight, the oblivion leaper has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on D20 Tests.

action.name: Soul Drain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is a living creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target loses 1 {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Die}. {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice} lost in this way return at the end of a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, and can be spent to regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} during that rest as normal.

If this effect reduces the target's number of available {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} to fewer than 0, the target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} target repeats the save, awakening on a success. If an oblivion stalker kills the creature while it has no {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice}, the target's soul is lost to the realm of shadow and can't be revived without mighty magic, such as a {@spell Wish|XPHB} or {@classFeature Divine Intervention|Cleric|XPHB|10|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the oblivion leaper can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

items: Since oblivion stalkers can drain almost any living creature's energy, and they can take just about any shape. Some oblivion stalkers retain the natural abilities of their original form. For instance, an oblivion stalker that was once a wolf might retain the Pack Tactics trait. Similarly, a boar could possess a version of Charge, draining its prey while adding Slashing damage and the possibility of knocking their victim {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

Keep one special ability that makes sense for a creature of the stalker's former form without affecting the {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB|Challenge} of the stalker. Avoid bestowing an oblivion stalker any ability that is magical, grants the stalker a ranged attack, or expands its {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances} or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities}.

trait.name: Sunlight Weakness
entries: While in sunlight, the oblivion whistler has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on D20 Tests.

trait.name: Unbearable Whistling
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the oblivion whistler and can hear it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. If the target is within 30 feet of the oblivion whistler and can hear it whistling, it suffers the effects of the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition even if it can't see the oblivion whistler. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Unbearable Whistling of all oblivion whistlers for 1 hour.

action.name: Soul Drain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is a living creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target loses 1 {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Die}. {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice} lost in this way return at the end of a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, and can be spent to regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} during that rest as normal.

If this effect reduces the target's number of available {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} to fewer than 0, the target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} target repeats the save, awakening on a success. If an oblivion stalker kills the creature while it has no {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice}, the target's soul is lost to the realm of shadow and can't be revived without mighty magic, such as a {@spell Wish|XPHB} or {@classFeature Divine Intervention|Cleric|XPHB|10|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the oblivion whistler can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

items: Since oblivion stalkers can drain almost any living creature's energy, and they can take just about any shape. Some oblivion stalkers retain the natural abilities of their original form. For instance, an oblivion stalker that was once a wolf might retain the Pack Tactics trait. Similarly, a boar could possess a version of Charge, draining its prey while adding Slashing damage and the possibility of knocking their victim {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

Keep one special ability that makes sense for a creature of the stalker's former form without affecting the {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB|Challenge} of the stalker. Avoid bestowing an oblivion stalker any ability that is magical, grants the stalker a ranged attack, or expands its {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances} or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities}.

trait.name: Sunlight Weakness
entries: While in sunlight, the oblivion brute has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on D20 Tests.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The oblivion brute uses Unbearable Howl, then makes a Soul Drain attack.

action.name: Soul Drain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is a living creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target loses 1 {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Die}. {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice} lost in this way return at the end of a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, and can be spent to regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} during that rest as normal.

If this effect reduces the target's number of available {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} to fewer than 0, the target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} target repeats the save, awakening on a success. If an oblivion stalker kills the creature while it has no {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice}, the target's soul is lost to the realm of shadow and can't be revived without mighty magic, such as a {@spell Wish|XPHB} or {@classFeature Divine Intervention|Cleric|XPHB|10|XPHB}.

action.name: Unbearable Howl (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, each living creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} that isn't {@condition Deafened|XPHB}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the Unbearable Howl of all oblivion brutes for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the oblivion brute can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

items: Since oblivion stalkers can drain almost any living creature's energy, and they can take just about any shape. Some oblivion stalkers retain the natural abilities of their original form. For instance, an oblivion stalker that was once a wolf might retain the Pack Tactics trait. Similarly, a boar could possess a version of Charge, draining its prey while adding Slashing damage and the possibility of knocking their victim {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

Keep one special ability that makes sense for a creature of the stalker's former form without affecting the {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB|Challenge} of the stalker. Avoid bestowing an oblivion stalker any ability that is magical, grants the stalker a ranged attack, or expands its {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances} or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities}.

trait.name: Sunlight Weakness
entries: While in sunlight, the oblivion juggernaut has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on D20 Tests.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The oblivion juggernaut uses Unbearable Roar, then makes a Soul Drain attack.

action.name: Soul Drain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d10 + 4}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is a living creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target loses 2 {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB}. {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice} lost in this way return at the end of a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, and can be spent to regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} during that rest as normal.

If this effect reduces the target's number of available {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} to fewer than 0, the target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} target repeats the save, awakening on a success. If an oblivion stalker kills the creature while it has no {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice}, the target's soul is lost to the realm of shadow and can't be revived without mighty magic, such as a {@spell Wish|XPHB} or {@classFeature Divine Intervention|Cleric|XPHB|10|XPHB}.

action.name: Unbearable Roar
entries: {@actSave wis} DC 18, each living creature of the oblivion juggernaut's choice in a 120-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the oblivion juggernaut that isn't {@condition Deafened|XPHB}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to the Unbearable Roar of all oblivion juggernauts for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the oblivion juggernaut can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

items: Since oblivion stalkers can drain almost any living creature's energy, and they can take just about any shape. Some oblivion stalkers retain the natural abilities of their original form. For instance, an oblivion stalker that was once a wolf might retain the Pack Tactics trait. Similarly, a boar could possess a version of Charge, draining its prey while adding Slashing damage and the possibility of knocking their victim {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

Keep one special ability that makes sense for a creature of the stalker's former form without affecting the {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB|Challenge} of the stalker. Avoid bestowing an oblivion stalker any ability that is magical, grants the stalker a ranged attack, or expands its {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances} or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities}.

trait.name: Ferocious Presence
entries: Allied creatures of the Ogre who are within 30 feet of the Ogre and can see him gain 5 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of their turn unless the Ogre has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Reckless Abandon
entries: At the start of its turn, the Ogre and allied creatures within 30 feet who can see or hear the Ogre can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, and attack rolls against them have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} until the start of their next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Ogre makes two War Sword attacks. He can replace one attack with Bellowing Command.

action.name: War Sword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Bellowing Command
entries: The Ogre chooses a creature it can see and commands up to three allies of {@filter CR 6 or lower|bestiary|Challenge Rating=[&0;&6]} who can see or hear the Ogre. The allies can use their {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} to make weapon attacks against the target. The allies roll {@dice 1d4} and add the result to their attack rolls.

action.name: Ravenous Appetite (3/Day)
entries: The Ogre grabs a Medium or smaller allied Humanoid of {@filter CR 1/2 or lower|bestiary|Challenge Rating=[&0;&1/2]|type=humanoid} within its reach and gnaws on its face and neck. The ally dies and the Ogre regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the ally's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum.

entities.name: Ogre Swine
languages: understands one language but can't speak

trait.name: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: If the ogre swine takes 10 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it is reduced to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

trait.name: Stench
entries: A creature other than an ogre or ogre swine that starts its turn within 5 feet of the ogre swine is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all ogre swine for 1 hour.

action.name: Tusk
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Poison damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target is infected with {@disease Sewer Plague|XDMG}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to being infected by all ogre swine for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Blood Aggression
entries: The ogre swine takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} action, moving toward a creature missing any of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The ogresh champion casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: A Friendly Ear (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: After speaking to a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|non-Hostile} creature for 1 minute, the ogresh champion can subject it to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 hour. It is unaware of being {@condition Charmed|XPHB} even after the effect ends.

trait.name: Powerful Build
entries: The ogresh champion counts as one Size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

trait.name: Smite
entries: When the ogresh champion hits with a melee attack, it can expend a spell from Spellcasting to deal extra radiant damage. The extra damage is 9 ({@damage 2d8}) for a 1/Day spell.

trait.name: Takes One to Know One
entries: The ogresh champion has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Warhammer
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: A Friendly Ear (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: After speaking to a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|non-Hostile} creature for 1 minute, the ogresh sage can subject it to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 hour. It is unaware of being {@condition Charmed|XPHB} even after the effect ends.

trait.name: Powerful Build
entries: The ogresh sage counts as one Size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

trait.name: Studied Defense
entries: The ogresh sage adds its Intelligence modifier to its AC instead of its Dexterity modifier (included above).

trait.name: Takes One to Know One
entries: The ogresh sage has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The sage makes two Quarterstaff attacks.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage, or 5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage if wielded with two hands.

bonus.name: Analyze Enemy
entries: The ogresh sage begins analyzing a creature it can see within 30 feet. If it maintains {@status Concentration|XPHB} for 1 minute, it can add its Intelligence bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls it makes against the target.

reaction.name: Sage Words
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the ogresh sage can see makes an attack roll or ability check. {@actResponse} If the target can hear and understand the ogresh sage, it gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the roll.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The oozing vulture has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against a creature missing any of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The oozing vulture doesn't provoke an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Corrupt Desire
entries: A Humanoid can bind themself to the ordeal tree. Each day the petitioner is bound to the tree, they must succeed on a Constitution saving throw with a DC equal to 15 plus the number of days bound or suffer an {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level. If they survive for 7 days, the ordeal tree can choose to grant a blessing. The tree only does this if the Humanoid is Evil, once per Humanoid. If the Humanoid is neutral or good, the tree attacks them instead.

The blessing is tailored to the petitioner's desires (at the GM's discretion), but might include a +1 bonus to an ability score, a Feat, {@variantrule Expertise|XPHB} in a skill, or the ability to innately cast a spell of level 3 or lower once per day using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

The petitioner also contracts the {@spell Curse of Foul Blight|GrimHollowPG24} {@homebrew |(see Grim Hallow Campaign Guide}). If the petitioner commits a profoundly evil act every day, the curse never advances beyond Stage 1. If the petitioner fails to commit any evil acts, the curse automatically escalates.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the ordeal tree remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary tree.

trait.name: Heart Sight
entries: The ordeal tree knows the alignment and desires of any creature that binds itself to the tree.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ordeal tree makes two Slam attacks and one Vine attack. It can replace the Vine attack with Enervate.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Vine
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 20 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 3d8 + 7}) Slashing damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}).

action.name: Enervate (2/Day)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the ordeal tree. {@actSaveFail} 44 ({@damage 8d10}) Necrotic damage, and the ordeal tree gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the Necrotic damage dealt.

entities.name: Pactbreaker
languages: understands Celestial and Infernal but can't speak

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The pactbreaker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Pact Breaking
entries: When the pactbreaker deals damage to a creature bound to a contract or pact with an Evil entity, the creature is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target can't use features, powers, and spells associated with their pact until the end of the pactbreaker's next turn. This effect ends the target's {@status Concentration|XPHB} on any such effects.

trait.name: Pact Sense
entries: The pactbreaker can sense creatures who have entered a pact with an Evil entity from up to 1,000 feet away. The pactbreaker knows the creature's distance and direction, and if it is moving, the pactbreaker knows the direction of its movement. Any effect that blocks Divination magic blocks this trait.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The pactbreaker makes two attacks, using Reactive Weapon or Eldritch Leash in any combination.

action.name: Reactive Weapon
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d10 + 5}) Force damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Psychic damage. On subsequent hits against the same target, the damage type changes if the target would be harmed more by another damage type: Force damage can become Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing, and Psychic damage can become Radiant or Necrotic.

action.name: Eldritch Leash
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 7}, range 300 ft. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d12 + 3}) Force damage, and if the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Flying Speed} is reduced to 0 and can't increase for 1 minute. If the target is flying, it safely descends at a rate of 60 feet per round until it reaches the ground or the effect ends. If the target has a natural {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} rather than one provided by a spell or magical effect, it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFailBy 5} The target falls normally.

action.name: Adjustable Form
entries: The pactbreaker changes its appearance, though it always appears to be a Construct. Alternatively, it ends one effect that is altering its form.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The panjaian alondon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The panjaian alondon can breathe air and water.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The panjaian alondon makes two Tidal Slam attacks.

action.name: Tidal Slam
entries: {@atkr ms} {@hit 5}, reach 30 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, the panjaian can push it up to 10 feet to an unoccupied space within 30 feet.

bonus.name: Mobile
entries: The panjaian alondon takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or Disengage action.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the panjaian alondon can see hits it with an attack. {@actResponse} The panjaian alondon halves the damage it takes from the attack.

trait.name: Heated Body
entries: A creature that touches the panjaian morakeshi or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Fire damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The panjaian morakeshi makes two attacks, using Slam and Hurl Fire in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Fire damage.

action.name: Hurl Fire
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 5}, range 30 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Fire damage.

action.name: Control Flame
entries: The panjaian morakeshi chooses a fire it can see within 30 feet and expands that fire by one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}, extinguishes fire in one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}, or makes shapes in the fire in one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}. Expanded fire needs fuel to continue burning.

action.name: Flame Wave {@recharge 5}
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Controlled Illumination
entries: The panjaian morakeshi sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 20-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 20 feet. The morakeshi can douse the light (no Action required), provided it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The panjaian gormadraugon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Ignite
entries: A creature or object that takes cold damage from the panjaian gormadraugon ignites. Until the target takes Fire damage, it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Cold damage at the start of each of its turns.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The panjaian gormadraugon regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the gormadraugon takes Fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The gormadraugon dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The panjaian gormadraugon makes two attacks, using Slam or Hurl Coldfire in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Cold damage, and the target is subjected to Ignite.

action.name: Hurl Coldfire
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 6}, range 60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Cold damage, and the target is subjected to Ignite.

bonus.name: Coldfire Crisis
entries: The panjaian gormadraugon causes a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it to become icy {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. Nonmagical flames in that area go out. Creatures of the gormadraugon's choice that start their turn in that area lose their {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Cold damage or treat their {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Cold damage as {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB}. This loss of {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} lasts until the start of the creature's next turn. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} lasts until the gormadraugon becomes {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, dies, or uses an action or {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to end it.

reaction.name: Prismatic Flash
entries: {@actTrigger} The panjaian gormadraugon fails a saving throw. {@actResponse} The gormadraugon rerolls the saving throw. If it succeeds, each creature within 30 feet of the gormadraugon is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The panjaian citrolachi casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: The panjaian citrolachi can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the citrolachi doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The panjaian citrolachi makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Control Earth
entries: The panjaian citrolachi chooses dirt or stone it can see within 30 feet of it. It can move one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} of loose dirt up to 5 feet. The citrolachi can also make one 5-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} of dirt or stone {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}, or vice versa.

action.name: Earth Slam {@recharge 5}
entries: Dexterity Saving Throw: {@dc 13}, each creature within 10 feet of a point the panjaian citrolachi can see within 30 feet (the panjaian citrolachi automatically succeeds). {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The panjaian ilharan casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The panjaian ilharan makes four Dagger attacks. It can draw daggers as part of this action.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Gift of Flight (1/Day)
entries: The panjaian ilharan touches up to four willing creatures. Each target gains a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Flying Speed} of 30 feet for 1 hour. When the effect ends, the target descends at a rate of 60 feet per round for 1 minute. If it touches the ground before the effect ends, it takes no falling damage and lands on its feet.

action.name: Storm Wave {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) Lightning damage plus 6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) Thunder damage, and the target is pushed up to 15 feet to the edge of the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Returning Wind
entries: The panjaian ilharan chooses up to four objects it can see within 60 feet. The objects must not be worn or carried, and can weigh up to 5 pounds combined. The objects fly up to 60 feet toward the ilharan, delivered into its hands or into open containers within 5 feet of it.

entities.name: Pesta
languages: the languages it knew in life

trait.name: Hazy Stealth
entries: The pesta has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks near heat shimmers or in dusty or misty air. In these conditions, the pesta can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The pesta can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Plague Stench
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the pesta is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d8}) Necrotic damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Plague Cloud (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The pesta creates a 20-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} of yellowish mist centered on a point within 60 feet. The mist spreads around corners and renders its area {@variantrule Lightly Obscured|XPHB}. The mist remains for 1 minute, until the pesta loses {@status Concentration|XPHB}, or until it is dispersed by a strong wind.

A creature that enters the mist for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and is infected with the pesta's disease (usually {@disease Sewer Plague|XDMG}). At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition (but not the disease) on a successful save. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

variant.name: Weeping Pesta
entries: Some pestas are the undead victims of the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24}, carrying that disease. Those diseased by such a pesta's Plague Cloud or {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} by its aura are infected with the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24}. A humanoid infected with this disease must repeat a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw every 24 hours, increasing its {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level by one on a failure. This {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} can't be reduced until the disease is cured by magic.

Until the first level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} sets in, however, the victim has sharpened senses. When making an ability check or saving throw against anything other than the disease, they can add a {@dice d4} to ability checks or saving throws. A slight fever and overexcitement are the only signs this condition comes from the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24}.

trait.name: Flock Static
entries: A creature other than a poffer that ends its turn within 5 feet of two or more poffers takes Lightning damage equal to the number of poffers within 5 feet of it , to a maximum of 4. A creature that takes 4 Lightning damage is also subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 10}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 2}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Bludgeoning damage.

resist.note: from attacks that aren't adamantine or silvered

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the poppet remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary doll.

trait.name: Turning Susceptibility
entries: The poppet can be turned as if it were Undead. However, it can't be destroyed by effects that Turn Undead.

action.name: Embrace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage. If the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition, the attack deals 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Psychic damage instead.

bonus.name: Eerie Laugh
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the poppet that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save (with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} if it can see the poppet), ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. {@actSaveFailBy 5} While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the Eerie Laugh of all poppets for 24 hours.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the poppet fiend remains motionless, it's indistinguishable from an ordinary doll.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The poppet fiend has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The poppet fiend shape-shifts into a doll or reverts to its true form, that of a Tiny imp-like devil. Its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. A {@spell Remove Curse|XPHB} spell cast on it while it is {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} or dead forcibly reverts it to its true form, then causes it to vanish in a puff of vile smoke.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The potbelly makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with Boil.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, the potbelly can halve the attack's damage and cause the target to have the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}). The potbelly can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

action.name: Boil
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 16}, one Medium or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the potbelly. {@actSaveFail} The grapple ends and the target is plopped into the potbelly's belly pot. The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the potbelly. It takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Fire damage immediately and at the start of each of the potbelly's turns. The potbelly can have up to two creatures boiling at a time.

The target can take an action to escape with a successful {@dc 16} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check, landing in a space within 5 feet of the potbelly. If the potbelly dies, the target is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and can escape from the corpse using 10 feet of its movement.

action.name: Snack
entries: The potbelly grabs the corpse of a Fey, Giant, or Humanoid that died no longer than 1 minute ago in its belly pot and takes a bite, regaining 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The potbelly can gain this benefit only once from each corpse.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The puck casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Fey Evasion
entries: If the puck is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, the puck instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The puck has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Plant Bond
entries: If the puck remains within 20 feet of a Huge or smaller plant for 8 hours, it can use special dust to form a bond with the plant, granting it sapience as if by the Awaken spell. The target gains the ability to understand Sylvan and becomes a puck version of an animated plant, such as a puck tree or puck shrub.

The puck can have only one plant {@condition Charmed|XPHB} in this way at a time. The condition ends if the puck harms the plant, and the plant can make a {@dc 10} Wisdom saving throw to end the condition if a request from the puck guarantees the plant's destruction. Plants freed from the charm leave the puck's grove, becoming inanimate again after 24 hours. Otherwise, the plant is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the puck for 30 days, after which the plant becomes the puck's willing servant.

The puck is emotionally bonded with each plant it has animated, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, and enthralled. Provided such a plant is within 1 mile, the puck is aware when the plant takes damage and knows its location. If such a plant is destroyed, the puck has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn as it grieves.

action.name: Superior Invisibility
