entries: The puck magically becomes {@condition Invisible|XPHB} until its {@status Concentration|XPHB} ends. Any equipment the puck wears or carries is {@condition Invisible|XPHB} with it.

bonus.name: Plant Manifestation
entries: The puck causes a plantlike duplicate of itself to emerge from a Plant within 120 feet that is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or enthralled by it. The puck can act through this duplicate until the end of its turn, at which point the duplicate disappears.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the puck can see hits it with an attack. {@actResponse} The puck halves the damage it takes from the attack.

legendary.name: Illusionary Menace
entries: Six images of the puck appear in multiple locations, each moving and speaking independently during the puck's turn. At the start and end of the puck's turn, and one time during the puck's movement, it can teleport to the location of one of these images. The images remain until the next round.

legendary.name: Hostile Nature
entries: Grasping vines and roots manifest in the lair. Strength or {@actSave dex} {@dc 10}, each creature {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} to the puck in the lair. {@actSaveFail} The target is moved up to 20 feet to another unoccupied space in the lair and gains the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Illusionary Menace
entries: Inanimate plants in the lair twist and sprout thorns. The area becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} to creatures {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} to the puck until the next round, and are subject to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 10}, when a creature moves more than half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} (as dictated by the {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}) in the area. {@actSaveFail} The creature gains the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveSuccess} the creature is {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immune} to the Poisonous Plants effect for 24 hours.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the puck shrub remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a thorny shrub.

action.name: Brambles
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) Slashing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, the puck shrub can halve the attack's damage and cause the target to have the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 11}). Until the grapple ends, the puck shrub can't make Brambles attacks against another target.

action.name: Hurl Thorns
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 3}, Range 30/60 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the puck tree remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a tree.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The puck tree deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, the puck tree can halve the attack's damage and cause the target to have the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). The puck tree can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 30/60 ft. {@h}32 ({@damage 5d10 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Fling
entries: The puck tree throws a Medium or smaller creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} up to 30 feet horizontally. The target takes {@damage 1d10} Bludgeoning damage per 10 feet it travels and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Deadfall
entries: {@actTrigger} The puck tree is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. {@actResponse}—{@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 15- foot long, 5-foot wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage.

action.name: Spit
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 10/30 ft. Hit:7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. First {@actSaveFail} The target has {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Bludgeoning damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature that takes an action to pour water on the spit grants the target {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its saving throws. Subsequent Failures: The target takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Pox Euphoria
entries: The putrid giant rolls {@dice 1d4} and adds the result to ability checks other than Intelligence checks, and saving throws other than Constitution saving throws.

trait.name: Weeping Pox
entries: A Humanoid that comes within 5 feet of the putrid giant or anything it has recently held is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24} for 24 hours. {@actSaveFail} The target is infected with the {@disease Weeping Pox|GrimHollowCG24}. Every 24 hours, the target repeats the save, suffering an {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level on a failure. This {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} can't be reduced until the disease is cured, and the disease can only be cured by magic.

Until the first {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level sets in, the target has sharpened senses and a sense of wellbeing. The target can roll {@dice 1d4} and add the result to any ability check or saving throw it makes, except saving throws to resist the disease.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The putrid giant makes two Greatclub attacks.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is subjected to Weeping Pox.

spellcasting.name: Fear (3/Day)
headerEntries: The quiet one casts {@spell Fear|XPHB} (spell save {@dc 14}), requiring no Material components.

trait.name: Silent
entries: The quiet one emits a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} with the effects of a {@spell Silence|XPHB} spell. It does not require {@status Concentration|XPHB} and, if dispelled, the quiet one can restore it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quiet one makes two Claw attacks and one Bite attack.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@dice 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage. If the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition, it takes an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage and the quiet one gains{@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the extra Psychic damage dealt.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The rabenhex doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Slashing damage. If the target is cursed by a rabenhex's Hex, it takes an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Hex (Recharges when the Hex Ends)
entries: The rabenhex places a curse on a creature it can see within 60 feet. The target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against rabenhexes and hags. The curse lasts for 1 minute, until the target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, or until the rabenhex attacks a different creature, has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, or dies. If the rabenhex is {@condition Invisible|XPHB}, using this trait doesn't reveal its location.

trait.name: Baneful Attack
entries: The raven of ill omen has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature with a bane from Affect Fortunes.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The raven of ill omen doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The raven of ill omen can mimic voices and other sounds it has heard. A creature that hears the mimicked sounds can tell they are an imitation with a successful {@dc 14} Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The raven of ill omen makes one Beak attack and one Talons attack.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Affect Fortunes
entries: The raven of ill omen chooses up to six creatures it can see within 60 feet. The raven assigns each creature a bane or boon for 1 minute, until the raven dies, or until it uses this {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} again. These effects don't stack with similar effects, such as the Bane and Bless spells.

items.name: Boon
entries: The target can roll a {@dice d4} and add the result to each ability check and saving throw it makes for the duration.

items.name: Bane
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target must roll a {@dice d4} and subtract the result from each ability check and saving throw it makes for the duration.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Remorseful Storm casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Adamant Panoply
entries: Any {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} against the Remorseful Storm becomes a normal hit.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The Remorseful Storm can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Relentless Zeal
entries: The first time the Remorseful Storm is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} but not killed, it does not fall unconscious and it does not die. Instead, it is filled with an enduring radiance that allows it to keep fighting with the following benefits until the end of its next turn:

items: The Remorseful Storm sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 30-foot radius.

At the start of each of the Remorseful Storm's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage. A creature that touches the Remorseful Storm or hit it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage.
The Remorseful Storm has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on weapon attacks.

entries: At the end of its turn, if the Remorseful Storm hit a creature with a melee attack, the Remorseful Storm regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}. Otherwise, it dies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Remorseful Storm makes two Greataxe attacks

action.name: Greataxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}35 ({@damage 4d12 + 9}) Force damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Lightning Strike {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, each creature within 10 feet of a point the Remorseful Storm can see within 500 feet. {@actSaveFail} 54 ({@damage 12d8}) Lightning damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

reaction.name: Retaliate
entries: {@actTrigger} The Remorseful Storm takes damage from a creature within 10 feet of it. {@actResponse} The Remorseful Storm makes a melee attack against that creature.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The restless lumberer can hold its breath indefinitely while conscious.

trait.name: Lurker's Patience
entries: The restless lumberer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks it makes while motionless.

trait.name: Vice Grip
entries: Any creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the restless lumberer also has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The restless lumberer makes three attacks, using Grab or Slam in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 15 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Grab
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 15 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 22}). The lumberer can grapple up to two creatures at a time, and can't make Slam attacks against other targets with a hand it is using to grapple.

reaction.name: Psychic Scar
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 20}, one or two grappled creatures. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Psychic damage, and the target is {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} No damage.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The horror regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the horror takes Fire or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the horror's next turn. The horror is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The horror has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

trait.name: Unerring Direction
entries: The horror knows the distance to and direction of the creature whose return to life spawned it, even if the creature and the horror are on different planes of existence. If the creature being tracked by the horror dies, the horror dies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The horror makes three Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13}, reach 10 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 3d12 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Bone Storm
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 40- foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Piercing damage plus 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Bleeding|GrimHollowPG24} condition {@homebrew |(see Grim Hollow Campaign Guide pg. 28)}. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The returned hunter casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

spellcasting.name: Hunter Magic (3/Day)
headerEntries: The returned hunter casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB} or {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Fey Touched
entries: The returned hunter has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions and magic that would impede its movement or put it to sleep.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The returned hunter makes three Shortsword attacks or two Longbow attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 150/600 ft. Hit:7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Vanish
entries: The returned hunter takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

entities.name: Rime Hunger
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Fed Fortitude
entries: For 1 minute after the rime hunger regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, when damage reduces the rime hunger to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it can make a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken), unless the damage is Fire, Radiant, or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. On a successful save, the rime hunger drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). The rime hunger can only grapple one target at a time.

action.name: Sapping Grasp
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the rime hunger. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage, and the rime hunger regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the Cold damage dealt. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The rougaugh deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Spiney Defense
entries: A creature adjacent to the rougaugh that attacks it with a melee weapon attack takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Piercing damage, regardless of whether the attack hits or misses.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The rougaugh makes three attacks: one with its Headbutt and two with its Spines.

action.name: Head Butt
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Spines
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Spine Splinter {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the rougaugh ({@condition Prone|XPHB} creatures have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}). {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 5d10}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Brute
entries: A weapon deals two extra dice of its damage when Runa hits with it (included in her attack).

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: Runa is immune to any effect that would alter her form.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If Runa fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If destroyed while her memento skull remains intact, Runa's body reforms in {@dice 2d4} days, regaining all her {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Her new body appears within 5 feet of the memento skull.

trait.name: Turn Immunity
entries: Runa is immune to effects that Turn Undead.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: When not wearing armor, Runa's {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB} equals 10 + her Dexterity modifier + her Constitution modifier. She can use a {@item Shield|XPHB} while gaining this benefit.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Runa uses Stunning Presence and makes four attacks with {@item Coldrazor|GrimHollowMG24}. She can use Wall of Fire in place of one attack.

action.name: Coldrazor (+3 Handaxe)
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 15}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d6 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Cold damage. {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}: 32 ({@damage 7d6 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 24 ({@damage 8d6}) Cold damage. {@hom} Coldrazor returns to Runa's hand immediately after being thrown

action.name: Stunning Presence
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 120-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from Runa that is aware of her. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Runa's Stunning Presence for 24 hours.

action.name: Wall of Fire {@recharge 5}
entries: Runa casts {@spell Wall of Fire|XPHB} (level 9 version, spell save {@dc 18}). This special version of the spell lasts until the start of Runa's next turn and doesn't require {@status Concentration|XPHB}.

reaction.name: Rampage
entries: {@actTrigger} Runa reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a Coldrazor attack. {@actResponse} Runa can move up to her {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a Coldrazor attack. Special: Runa regains her {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} before and after using this ability.

reaction.name: Retaliate
entries: {@actTrigger} Runa takes damage from a creature within 5 feet of her. {@actResponse} Runa makes a melee weapon attack against that creature.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Runa makes a {@item Coldrazor|GrimHollowMG24} attack.

legendary.name: Move
entries: Runa moves up to her {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Curse of Cowardice
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, one {@condition Stunned|XPHB} creature Runa can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. While {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on saving throws and takes an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage from Runa's weapon attacks. This effect ends when the creature is no longer {@condition Stunned|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Runa can't use this action again until the start of her next turn.

legendary.name: Siphon Vitality {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from Runa. {@actSaveFail} 39 ({@damage 6d12}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Desert Hardened
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against {@hazard Dehydration|XPHB}, thirst, and hunger, and it needs half as much food and water as a normal creature of its size. Also, the giant is adapted to {@hazard Extreme Heat|XDMG} and {@hazard Extreme Cold|XDMG|Cold}.

trait.name: Desert Stride
entries: The giant ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} due to sand, rubble, or similar debris.

trait.name: Sand Camouflage
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to {@action Hide|XPHB} in sandy or sandstone terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Longsword or Rock in any combination.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) Slashing damage, or 22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Slashing damage if wielded with two hands.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, reach 60/240 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Desert Hardened
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against {@hazard Dehydration|XPHB}, thirst, and hunger, and it needs half as much food and water as a normal creature of its size. Also, the giant is adapted to {@hazard Extreme Heat|XDMG} and {@hazard Extreme Cold|XDMG|Cold}.

trait.name: Desert Stride
entries: The giant ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} due to sand, rubble, or similar debris.

trait.name: Sand Camouflage
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to {@action Hide|XPHB} in sandy or sandstone terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes three attacks. It can replace one attack with War Command even if the {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} is not recharged.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, reach 60/240 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: War Command {@recharge 5}
entries: The giant chooses an ally of CR 9 or less that can hear and understand it, commanding it to attack a creature the giant attacked this turn. The ally can use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make an attack against the designated creature, adding the giant's {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} to the damage roll.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Desert Hardened
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against {@hazard Dehydration|XPHB}, thirst, and hunger, and it needs half as much food and water as a normal creature of its size. Also, the giant is adapted to {@hazard Extreme Heat|XDMG} and {@hazard Extreme Cold|XDMG|Cold}.

trait.name: Desert Stride
entries: The giant ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} due to sand, rubble, or similar debris.

trait.name: Sand Camouflage
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to {@action Hide|XPHB} in sandy or sandstone terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes three attacks, using Greatclub or Sun Bolt in any combination.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Sun Bolt
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) Radiant damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks and can't benefit from the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition until the end of the giant's next turn.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The scream thief can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Life Drain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d8}) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to half the damage taken.

action.name: Silence the Living {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, a Humanoid within 30 feet of the scream thief. {@actSaveFail} 19 ({@damage 3d12}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the target can't vocalize a sound of any kind. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

reaction.name: Fragment the Spirit
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature is killed by the scream thief. {@actResponse} The target's spirit rises as 3 ({@damage 1d6}) psychic fragments in the nearest unoccupied space to its corpse. The fragments are under the scream thief's control.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The psychic fragment can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The psychic fragment can mimic a single word or phrase it spoke in life. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful {@dc 11} Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) check.

action.name: Withering Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Necrotic damage.

entities.name: Psychic Fragment Swarm
languages: can repeat one phrase it knew in life

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The swarm can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Maddening Voices
entries: The swarm constantly emits a babble of words and phrases spoken in life by its many undead spirits. A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the swarm is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The creature is immune to Maddening Voices for 24 hours.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain{@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Withering Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage, or 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Shadow Shape
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the shadow mauler can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Sunlight Vulnerability
entries: While in sunlight, the shadow mauler loses its {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities}. It also has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The shadow mauler makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bites
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d10 + 3}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Shadow Escape
entries: In {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the shadow mauler can take the {@action Disengage|XPHB} or {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Shadowsteel ghoul has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Shadowsteel Coat
entries: The ghoul is coated in metal armor made of Shadowsteel.

trait.name: Shadowsteel Hunger
entries: The Shadowsteel ghoul has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against creatures carrying or wearing Shadowsteel.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Shadowsteel ghoul makes two Claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage. A cursed target must make an Escalation Check. If this damage reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and it isn't already cursed, roll {@dice 1d4} to determine which curse it is afflicted with: 1–2 {@spell Curse of Damned Aging|GrimHollowPG24}, 3–4 {@spell Curse of Foul Blight|GrimHollowPG24}. {@homebrew |(See Grim Hollow Campaign Guide for information on curses and escalation.)}

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The ghast casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
headerEntries: The ghast casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (5/Day)
headerEntries: The ghast casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The ghast has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Shadowsteel Coat
entries: The ghast is coated in metal armor made of Shadowsteel.

trait.name: Shadowsteel Miasma
entries: Any creature of the ghast's choice that starts its turn within 30 feet of the ghast must roll {@dice 1d4} and subtract the result from any attack roll or saving throw it makes until the start of its next turn. Only one miasma can affect a given creature at a time. A creature that rolls a natural 20 on any attack roll or saving throw while in a Shadowsteel Miasma is immune to the miasma of any shadowsteel ghast for 1 hour.

trait.name: Turning Defiance
entries: The ghast and any shadowsteel ghouls within 30 feet of it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghast makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with Grave Surge.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. A cursed target must make an Escalation Check. If a target drops to 0 hit points due to this damage and isn't already cursed, it is afflicted with a random curse of the GM's choice from the {@filter Grim Hollow Player's Guide|spells|source=gh|subschool=curse}.

entities.name: Shatter Corpse
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Glass Spikes
entries: A creature that makes a melee attack against the shatter corpse takes 3 Piercing damage. The creature knows this before making the attack, and can impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its attack roll to avoid the damage.

trait.name: Loud
entries: Creatures have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks made to hear the approach of a shatter corpse.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The shatter corpse has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

trait.name: Undead Fortitude
entries: If damage reduces the shatter corpse to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it must make a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken), unless the damage is Bludgeoning, Radiant, or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. On a success, the shatter corpse drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Volley of Glass {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Slashing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the shrieking mandrake remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from ordinary mandrake.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 1}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage.

reaction.name: Shriek
entries: {@actTrigger} The shrieking mandrake emerges from the ground. {@actResponse}—{@actSave wis} {@dc 10}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the shrieking mandrake that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Psychic damage.{@actSaveFailBy 5} The target also has the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make a {@dc 10} Constitution saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it automatically succeeds.

entities.name: Skeleton Rifler
languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Dead Rifle
entries: The rifle a skeleton rifler carries is nonfunctional as a ranged weapon for a creature other than a skeleton rifler. For the skeleton rifler, the rifle never needs to be reloaded.

action.name: Bayonet
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Dead Rifle
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 40/120 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d12 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

entities.name: Skeleton Cannoneer
languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Dead Firearms
entries: The cannon and pistol a skeleton cannoneer uses are nonfunctional as ranged weapons for a creature other than a skeleton cannoneer. For the skeleton cannoneer, the pistol never needs to be reloaded.

action.name: Pistol Club
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Dead Pistol
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/90 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Dead Cannon
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 15-foot Sphere centered on a point within 500 feet of the skeleton cannoneer but no closer than 50 feet to it. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The skeleton cannoneer can't use Dead Cannon again until it takes an action to load it.

Alternatively, the skeleton cannoneer can target the cannon itself. Doing so causes the cannon to explode in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, destroying it and increasing the damage dealt by 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

entities.name: Skeleton Commander
languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The skeleton commander makes two Pike attacks. It can replace one attack with Warlord Strike even if it is not recharged.

action.name: Pike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Warlord Strike {@recharge 5}
entries: The skeleton commander chooses an Undead ally of CR 3 or less that can hear and understand it, commanding it to attack a creature the skeleton commander attacked this turn. The ally can use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make an attack against the designated creature, adding the skeleton commander's {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} to the damage roll.

reaction.name: Brandish Standard
entries: {@actTrigger} An Undead the skeleton commander can see within 30 feet makes an attack roll or saving throw. {@actResponse} The skeleton commander brandishes the tattered banner on its pike. The triggering creature can roll 1d4 and add the result to its roll, provided it can see the skeleton commander and isn't already benefiting from Brandish Standard.

trait.name: Supernaturally Sharp
entries: The skinweaver's Tanning Knife attacks ignore {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} (but not {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB}) to Slashing damage.

trait.name: Shocking Visage
entries: A Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the skinweaver and can see it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target automatically succeeds on further saves against Shocking Visage until it loses sight of the skinweaver.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The skinweaver make two Tanning Knife attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Web Whip.

action.name: Tanning Knife
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d8 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Web Whip
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, reach 25 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Piercing damage, and the target is pulled up to 20 feet toward the skinweaver.

action.name: Web Net {@recharge 5}
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 30/60 ft. {@h}The target is covered with leathery webbing and has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. A creature can take an action to free the creature with a successful {@dc 13} Strength check. The webbing can also be attacked ({@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} 10; 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}; {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Slashing damage; {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

trait.name: Air Buoyancy
entries: If the skywailer dies or has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, it floats upward 10 feet on its turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The skywailer makes two attacks, using Tentacle or Ectoplasmic Tendril in any combination.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 15 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The skywailer has ten tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.

action.name: Ectoplasmic Tendril
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/60 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. A creature can take an action to destroy the tendril with a {@dc 15} Strength check, freeing the target. The tendril can also be attacked ({@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} 10; 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}; {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Poison and Psychic damage). Destroying a tendril deals no damage to the skywailer.

action.name: Wail {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 13}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the skywailer. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Jet
entries: While flying, the skywailer can take the {@action Dash|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Quick Reel
entries: The skywailer pulls each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it up to 15 feet toward it.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The sleep gulper can breathe both air and water.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The sleep gulper can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Stinger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target can repeat the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it automatically succeeds.

action.name: Drain Essence
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft., one {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage, and the sleep gulper regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the damage dealt.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The slimm can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending additional movement.

trait.name: Corrosive Body
entries: A creature that touches the slimm or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Humanoid Shape
entries: While the slimm remains still, it can pass for Humanoid to anyone who fails a {@dc 14} Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check. If the slimm is in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, this check is made with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Nimble Ooze
entries: The slimm can move through the space of any creature larger than the slimm. If the slimm moves through a creature's space, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 12} Dexterity saving throw to avoid touching the slimm's Corrosive Body.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Acid damage.

reaction.name: Explosive Split
entries: {@actTrigger} While the slimm is Medium and has 10+ {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and it is subjected to Lightning, Slashing, or Thunder damage or takes 10+ damage in a single turn. {@actResponse} {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the slimm. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 3d4}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The slim splits into two new slimms, which appear at opposite edges of the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Each new slimm is one size smaller than the original slimm and acts on its {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}. The original slimm's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are divided evenly between the new slimms (round down).

reaction.name: Rejoin
entries: {@actTrigger} A Small slimm ends its turn within 5 feet of another Small slimm. {@actResponse} Both slimms use their Reactions to rejoin into a single Medium slimm in one of the two slimm's spaces. The original slimms' {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are combined to determine the {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} of the new slimm.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The slumbering titan has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Sleepy
entries: The slumbering titan has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end effects that put it to sleep. If the titan is the target of a {@spell Sleep|XPHB} spell, treat its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} as half their current value to determine whether the spell takes effect.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The slumbering titan makes three attacks, using Slam or Rock in any combination. It can replace one of these attacks with Fling or Stomp.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 15 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d8 + 9}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the giant can deal half as much damage and grapple the target (escape {@dc 21}). The titan can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 14}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}31 ({@damage 4d10 + 9}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Fling
entries: The titan throws a Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@actSave dex} DC 19, each creature on the ground within 30 feet of the titan. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the vampire is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the vampire instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Feeding Frenzy
entries: When the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} from its Bite, it has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Forbiddance
entries: The vampire can enter a residence only with an invitation from one of that home's residents. If the vampire enters a house uninvited and involuntarily, it takes {@damage 1d10} Psychic damage at the end of each of its turns while it remains there.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the vampire has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes one Bite attack and two Longsword attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage, or 9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Slashing damage if wielded with two hands.

bonus.name: Teleport {@recharge 5}
entries: The vampire disappears in shadowy mist and teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet.

reaction.name: Horrifying Revelation
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet of the vampire deals damage to it. {@actResponse} {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to this vampire's Horrifying Revelation for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The vampire casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Borrowed Blood
entries: The vampire has six {@dice d12|d12s} it can use in place of {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice}to cast sangromancy spells. When the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} using its Bite, it regains one expended {@dice d12}.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the vampire is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the vampire instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Forbiddance
entries: The vampire can enter a residence only with an invitation from one of that home's residents. If the vampire enters a house uninvited and involuntarily, it takes {@damage 1d10} Psychic damage at the end of each of its turns while it remains there.

trait.name: Relentless Blood (1/Day)
entries: If damage reduces the vampire to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it can make a Charisma saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken), unless the damage is Radiant or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. On a success, the vampire drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the vampire has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes three attacks, using Dagger or Frigid Burst in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Frigid Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Cold damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the vampire's next turn.

bonus.name: Teleport {@recharge 5}
entries: The vampire disappears in shadowy mist and teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet.

reaction.name: Horrifying Revelation
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet of the vampire deals damage to it. {@actResponse}—{@actSave wis} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to this vampire's Horrifying Revelation for 24 hours.

trait.name: Brute
entries: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the vampire hits with it (included in the attacks).

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the vampire is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the vampire instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Guarded Mind
entries: The vampire's emotions and thoughts can't be read.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: The vampire has these weaknesses:

items.name: Forbiddance
entries: The vampire can enter a residence only with an invitation from one of that home's residents. If the vampire enters a house uninvited and involuntarily, it takes {@damage 1d10} Psychic damage at the end of each of its turns while it remains there.

items.name: Stake to the Heart
entries: If a weapon that deals Piercing damage if driven into the vampire's heart while it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition in its resting place, the vampire has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until the weapon is removed.

items.name: Sunlight
entries: The vampire takes 10 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, the vampire has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes four attacks, using Rapier or Dagger in any combination. It can replace one attack with Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage, or 22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Piercing damage if the attack was made with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Charm {@recharge 5}
entries: The vampire casts {@spell Charm Person|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}). The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target is a willing recipient of the vampire's Bite, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the vampire.

action.name: Creatures of the Night (1/Day)
entries: Provided it isn't in direct sunlight, the vampire magically calls 5 ({@dice 2d4}) {@creature Swarms of Bats|XMM} or {@creature Swarm of Rats|XMM}. While outdoors, the vampire can call 5 ({@dice 2d4}) {@creature Wolf|XMM|Wolves} instead. The called beasts arrive in 2 ({@dice 1d4}) rounds, acting as allies of the vampire and obeying its spoken commands. The beasts remain for 1 hour, until the vampire dies, or until the vampire dismisses them as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Teleport {@recharge 5}
entries: The vampire disappears in shadowy mist and teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet.

reaction.name: Horrifying Revelation
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet of the vampire deals damage to it. {@actResponse}—{@actSave wis} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. If the target succeeds on its save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to this vampire's Horrifying Revelation for 24 hours.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: The spythronar sac appears to be a tangled ball of string, twigs, and dirt. A creature that can see the sac can identify it with a successful {@dc 15} Intelligence ({@skill Arcana} or {@skill Nature}) check.

trait.name: Fragile
entries: A creature who enters the spythronar sac's space must succeed on a {@dc 10} Dexterity saving throw or the sac is destroyed.

trait.name: Lightning Release
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 10}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the sac when it is destroyed. {@actSaveFail} 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Each spythronar in the area gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its next attack roll.

trait.name: Shocking Birth
entries: When a spythronar sac takes Lightning damage from a source other than another spythronar, it hatches, transforming into a {@creature Spythronar Swarm|GrimHollowMG24} with 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Adhesive
entries: The spythronar web adheres to anything it touches. A creature that touches the web can avoid adhering to it by succeeding on a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw (a creature hit by the web's Crush attack automatically fails). A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the web also has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). If adhered to a target larger than it can grapple, the web can release the adhesive or remain adhered and be dragged along with the target as it moves. A creature can take an action to separate an object or creature from the web with a successful {@dc 13} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check.

trait.name: Amorphous Form
entries: The spythronar web can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the spythronar web remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a large, thick spider web.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: A spythronar web can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The spythronar web ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same webbing.

action.name: Crush
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is subjected to Adhesive. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the web can't Crush another target.

action.name: Lightning Surge
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 30 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Lightning damage. Each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the web also takes this damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: A spythronar swarm can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The spythronar swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny arachnid. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain{@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The spythronar web ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same webbing.

action.name: Bites
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. {@h}10 ({@damage 4d4}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Lightning damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Lightning damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Weave (4/Day)
entries: The spythronar swarm weaves webbing, covering a 5-foot Square. The swarm can give up 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} to create a spythronar sac in that space. If the swarm's webbing covers a 10-foot Square, it can give up 23 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to instead create a spythronar web with the same number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The swarm can't drop to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to create a sac or web.

If the swarm weaves an incomplete web, that web is a normal web rather than a sentient, monstrous one. A creature that enters the normal web's space must succeed on a {@dc 10} Strength saving throw or have the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 10}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. Each 5-foot Square of this web has {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} 10, the Vulnerabilities, {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities}, and {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances} of a spythronar web, and 5 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Furtive
entries: The spythronar swarm takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The stygian bat doesn't provoke an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The stygian bat makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the bat has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack, it deals an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the bat flew 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

entities.name: Styrkvisnar
languages: Any three languages (can't speak in Hybrid Form)

trait.name: Adaptable Warrior
entries: The styrkvisnar has proficiency with all weapons.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The styrkvisnar can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
entries: If the styrkvisnar fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The styrkvisnar makes three attacks, using Bite, Talons, Tail, or Unarmed Strikes in any combination.

action.name: Bite (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Tail (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Talons (Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Thunderous Roar {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Thunder damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The roar is audible over 1 mile.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The styrkvisnar shape-shifts into a Medium Humanoid or back into its true form, which is a hybrid of eagle, seal, and wolf. Its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: The styrkvisnar uses Bite, Tail, Talon, or Unarmed Strike.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The styrkvisnar moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The sunwraith has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The sunwraith makes two Greatsword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Life Burn it available.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Force damage plus 18 ({@damage 1d4}) Necrotic or Radiant damage (sunwraith's choice).

action.name: Life Burn {@recharge}
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft {@h}30 ({@damage 6d8 + 3}) Necrotic or Radiant damage (sunwraith's choice). The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. A Humanoid killed by this effect rises as a specter at the start of the sunwraith's next turn. The specter is under the sunwraith's direct control. The sunwraith can control seven specters at a time.

reaction.name: Blinding Corona
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature that can see the sunwraith harms it with an attack or effect from more than 5 feet away. {@actResponse}—{@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it automatically succeeds.

entities.name: Suture Golem
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The suture golem can't shape-shift.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The suture golem has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The suture golem makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Suture Whip.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 4d4 + 3}) Force damage.

action.name: Suture Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 15 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Force damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) and is pulled into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the suture golem. Until the grapple ends, the suture golem can't make Suture Whip attacks against another target.

If the suture golem hits a Medium or smaller target with Suture Whip while the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition and is within 5 feet of the suture golem, the target is pulled into the suture golem's space and sutured to its body. The grapple ends and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, the target moves with the suture golem, and the suture golem can't make attacks against it. It can escape from the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition in the same fashion as the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition, but has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its check to do so.

The suture golem can have up to two Medium or smaller creatures sutured to its body at a time. While it has two creatures trapped in this way, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved. If the suture golem dies, the sutures dissolve, freeing the creatures.

bonus.name: Suture Constrict
entries: Each creature {@condition Restrained|XPHB} by the suture golem takes 8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the svangras remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary wild onion. The Sapping Grass action doesn't disrupt this disguise.

action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 2}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Sapping Grass (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 10}, each non-Plant creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the svangras. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage.{@actSaveFailBy 5} The target also suffers an {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level.

trait.name: Keen Hearing
entries: The swarm of ears has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on hearing.

trait.name: Pain Transfer
entries: When the swarm takes damage and creatures {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by it are in its space, divide the damage in half. The swarm takes one half, and the other half is divided among the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} creatures.

trait.name: Sound Dependent
entries: While the swarm is {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, creatures have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against the swarm's Overwhelming Whispers.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm of ears can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain{@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Waxy Discharge
entries: The swarm's space is covered with viscous wax that dries quickly as the swarm moves. This area is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for creatures other than swarms of ears and creatures {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by them.

action.name: Overwhelming Whispers
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in the swarm's space. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Psychic damage, or 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Psychic damage if the swarm has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition, and the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of the swarm's next turn. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target must use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move with the swarm, remaining in its space if possible. Movement used in this way is still expended on the target's next turn.

action.name: Sacrifice
entries: While in the kokela's space, the swarm of ears can destroy itself. The kokela regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the swarm's remaining {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and the swarm dies.

entities.name: The Churning

trait.name: Enormous Space
entries: The Churning takes up an entire 60-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}. Other creatures can move through this space, but a creature that does so is subjected to Engulf.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Churning has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The Churning deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Unstoppable
entries: The Churning ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}, and nothing can reduce its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} or stop it from moving on its turn.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 20 ft. {@h}43 ({@damage 6d10 + 10}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pulled into a space within 5 feet of the Churning.

action.name: Engulf
entries: The Churning moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and can move through the spaces of other creatures, subjecting each of them to the following effect. Strength or {@actSave dex} {@dc 23}. {@actSaveFail} 40 ({@damage 10d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pulled into the Churning's body. The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, is suffocating, and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the Churning. At the start of each of the Churning's turns, the target takes 42 ({@damage 12d6}) Bludgeoning damage.

The target can escape the Churning by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 23} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. Escaping the Churning costs 15 feet of movement and ejects the target into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the Churning. If the chapped brute dies, the target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape without using an action or making a check.
If the target dies while engulfed, its body breaks up and the Churning keeps anything it was wearing or carrying.

reactionHeader: The Churning can take up to four {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} per round but only one per turn.

reaction.name: Grab
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature moves while within reach of the Churning's Pseudopod attack. {@actResponse} The Churning uses Pseudopod.

trait.name: Demiplane
entries: The subject content of the tachna becomes a 40-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}-shaped sentient demiplane designed to lure and trap victims. A creature within a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 13} (a target touching the tachnaautomatically fails). {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled into the tachna's demiplane, arriving in a random unoccupied space. The target canstill attack the tachna from within it, and can't leave the demiplane by any means until the tachna is defeated. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this trait for 1 hour.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tachna uses Tremor, if available, and makes two Tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tremor {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, each creature in the tachna's demiplane. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Demiplane
entries: The subject content of the tachna gallery becomes a 60-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}-shaped sentient demiplane designed to lure and trap victims. A creature within a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 20} (a target touching the tachna gallery automatically fails). {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled into the tachna gallery's demiplane, arriving in a random unoccupied space. The target can still attack the tachna gallery from within it, and can't leave the demiplane by any means until the tachna gallery is defeated. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this trait for 1 hour.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the tachna gallery fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Psychic Aura
entries: creature that starts its turn in the tachna gallery's demiplane takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tachna gallery uses Tremor and makes three Tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 18}, reach 60 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tremor
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 20}, each creature in the tachna's demiplane. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Mind Blast {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 20}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the tachna gallery. {@actSaveFail} 54 ({@damage 12d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it automatically succeeds.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the tangle weed remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary plant.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 15 ft. {@h}The target takes 8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. At the end of the tangle weed's turn, the target is pulled 5 feet toward it.

reaction.name: Whipping Strand
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the tangle weed is subject to an effect that moves it and ends the {@condition Grappled|XPHB|Grapple}. {@actResponse} The tangle weed makes a Constrict attack against the creature.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The tar creep can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Kindle
entries: When the tar creep takes Fire damage, it ignites. While burning, the tar creep's Slam attacks adhere flaming pitch to foes, dealing an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage and igniting the target. Until a burning creature takes an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tar creep makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with Engulf.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The tar creep can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

action.name: Engulf
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the tar creep. {@actSaveFail} The grapple ends and the target is pulled into the tar creep's body. The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, is suffocating, and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the tar creep. At the start of each of the blood ooze's turns, the target takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage if the tar creep is burning. The tar creep can have one creature engulfed at a time.

The target can escape the tar creep by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. Escaping the tar creep costs 5 feet of movement and ejects the target into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the tar creep. If the tar creep dies, the target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape without using an action or making a check.
If the target dies while engulfed, its body dissolves and the tar creep expels anything it was wearing or carrying.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The tar juggernaut can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Engulfing Charge
entries: If the tar juggernaut moves 20+ feet straight toward a creature immediately before hitting it with a Slam attack, the target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition, and if it is a Medium or smaller creature, the tar juggernaut can use Engulf against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Kindle
entries: When the tar juggernaut takes Fire damage, it ignites. While burning, the tar juggernaut's Slam attacks adhere flaming pitch to foes, dealing an extra 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Fire damage and igniting the target. Until a burning creature takes an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tar juggernaut makes three Slam attacks. It can use Engulf in place of any attack.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 15 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The tar juggernaut can grapple up to two creatures at a time.

action.name: Engulf
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 18}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the tar juggernaut. {@actSaveFail} The grapple ends and the target is pulled into the tar juggernaut's body. The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, is suffocating, and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the tar juggernaut. At the start of each of the blood ooze's turns, the target takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Bludgeoning damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Fire damage if the tar juggernaut is burning. The tar juggernaut can have one Large creature or two Medium or smaller creatures engulfed at a time.

The target can escape the tar juggernaut by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 18} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. Escaping the tar juggernaut costs 5 feet of movement and ejects the target into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the tar juggernaut. If the tar juggernaut dies, the target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape without using an action or making a check.
If the target dies while engulfed, its body dissolves and the tar juggernaut expels anything it was wearing or carrying.

variant.name: Tar Juggernaut (Ranged)
entries: Ranged attacks might be important for more powerful monsters to have, especially if the powerful characters they oppose have a variety of ways to attack from a distance. The tar juggernaut's Engulfing Charge may help in such cases, but other options can be helpful. If you find the tar juggernaut needs a ranged attack, consider the following:

entries.name: Hurl Tar
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 50/150 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). Until this grapple ends, the target makes ranged weapon or spell attacks with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Thorn Rot
entries: A Humanoid that takes damage from the thornhost's Thorns attack or Burst is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Piercing damage. For 3 rounds, the target repeats the save at the start of each of its turns as the thorn continues to burrow.
